Friend — Some folks say that “shock and awe” is Trump’s entire strategy.
Constantly fill the airwaves and social media with his outrageous executive orders, his unqualified, controversial cabinet members, and his strange and offensive statements.
The goal is to leave the opposition (that’s us) reeling and unable to organize against the tidal wave of breaking news. It’s our job and the job of this progressive movement to stay focused on our goals and ready to take on the fights that matter most.
That’s why we’re reaching out today and asking for your support.
If you could [**chip in just $5 today,**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-may25.meJdrd&refcode=em250510-1-180&t=2&akid=1630%2E791427%2EloPKe8) you would help Ilhan keep up the fight in Congress to oppose Trump’s administration and legislative agenda.
And it wouldn’t just be your $5, either. While you’re reading this email right now in your inbox, thousands of others are reading it too. Some have already chipped in their $5. Some are about to click one of the buttons below.
When everyone does their part, it adds up to be enough to take on the far-right and their corporate Super PACs and win big victories for our grassroots movement. We’ve seen it work time and time again.

clean_body: Friend — Some folks say that “shock and awe” is Trump’s entire strategy. Constantly fill the airwaves and social media with his outrageous executive orders, his unqualified, controversial cabinet members, and his strange and offensive statements. The goal is to leave the opposition (that’s us) reeling and unable to organize against the tidal wave of breaking news. It’s our job and the job of this progressive movement to stay focused on our goals and ready to take on the fights that matter most. That’s why we’re reaching out today and asking for your support. If you could you would help Ilhan keep up the fight in Congress to oppose Trump’s administration and legislative agenda. And it wouldn’t just be your $5, either. While you’re reading this email right now in your inbox, thousands of others are reading it too. Some have already chipped in their $5. Some are about to click one of the buttons below. When everyone does their part, it adds up to be enough to take on the far-right and their corporate Super PACs and win big victories for our grassroots movement. We’ve seen it work time and time again. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: | | ** | | | | | | | In solidarity, Team Ilhan PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

name: Mandela Barnes
subject: "The Long Run"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
We were able to make the difference and get changemaking candidates over the finish line.
#
Team — it’s Mandela Barnes.
When we launched The Long Run PAC two years ago, a lot of people asked me where the name came from.
Part of the reason for the name is simply that I like to run. Running has taught me that winning a race isn’t about what you do on race day – it’s about how you’ve trained and prepared. You have to devote time and resources in early phases to prepare for that run.
That made the mission of The Long Run clear from the start: Provide support to changemaking candidates from diverse, working-class backgrounds who are running to transform their communities for the better.
And so we named ourselves “The Long Run” **because that crucial mission is going to take time** — time to invest in candidates on the ground, time to bring people together around a progressive vision, time to build winning grassroots campaigns.
We have already seen the results of those investments in last year’s election, with five Long Run-endorsed Senate candidates and six House candidates winning tough races. And we saw it just last month with our big win in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race.
So look, I know this isn’t exactly an optimistic time. Trump’s rule over the country has so far led to chaos, lawlessness, and hardship for many. A lot of us are wondering what’s next, what we can do in the face of right-wing governance.
But I want you to remember that, just like running a race, the kind of change we want to make is going to take time. The Long Run is going to continue to focus on our mission of supporting incredible candidates around the country.
And over time, our victories will continue to add up until we’ve built the kind of movement that defeats the far-right every time.
So please: [**If you want to support that work, and power The Long Run for the days ahead, please make a contribution of $5 or whatever you can afford today. Every dollar we invest right now helps us get started on our long-term goals.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-may25.cks14D&refcode=em250510-1-360&t=1&akid=5543%2E196590%2EAZHC01)

Mandela Barnes

clean_body: We were able to make the difference and get changemaking candidates over the finish line. Team — it’s Mandela Barnes. When we launched The Long Run PAC two years ago, a lot of people asked me where the name came from. Part of the reason for the name is simply that I like to run. Running has taught me that winning a race isn’t about what you do on race day – it’s about how you’ve trained and prepared. You have to devote time and resources in early phases to prepare for that run. That made the mission of The Long Run clear from the start: Provide support to changemaking candidates from diverse, working-class backgrounds who are running to transform their communities for the better. And so we named ourselves “The Long Run” because that crucial mission is going to take time — time to invest in candidates on the ground, time to bring people together around a progressive vision, time to build winning grassroots campaigns. We have already seen the results of those investments in last year’s election, with five Long Run-endorsed Senate candidates and six House candidates winning tough races. And we saw it just last month with our big win in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race. So look, I know this isn’t exactly an optimistic time. Trump’s rule over the country has so far led to chaos, lawlessness, and hardship for many. A lot of us are wondering what’s next, what we can do in the face of right-wing governance. But I want you to remember that, just like running a race, the kind of change we want to make is going to take time. The Long Run is going to continue to focus on our mission of supporting incredible candidates around the country. And over time, our victories will continue to add up until we’ve built the kind of movement that defeats the far-right every time. So please: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you so much for your support over the last two years. I look forward to working together to fight back. Mandela Barnes

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: My story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
I'm running for re-election to the U.S. Senate in Colorado
Hey Peter, I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate, and I hope you'll join me in the fight to give Colorado's priorities and values a voice in Washington.
**[Let me tell you more about this decision, then will you split a donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots to help build this campaign from the ground up?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88449?refcode=em20250510-8926&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8926%2E614464%2ETJGEc-)**
**[DONATE NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88449?refcode=em20250510-8926&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8926%2E614464%2ETJGEc-)**
Before diving into the world of politics, I took a chance, like so many small business owners do, and opened Denver's very first brewpub: Wynkoop Brewing Company. At Wynkoop, we were known for our unique beers like the Timberland Pale and Sagebrush Stout, which we offered at just $2.25 per pint— _a great deal compared to mainstream options!_
**Wynkoop was more than just a brewpub for me. It was a place where people with diverse viewpoints could come together, united by a shared love of good beer. It was a community where we proved time and again that there’s hardly anything that can’t be sorted out over a refreshing pint.**
Below are some nostalgic photos from the Wynkoop’s early days!
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88449?refcode=em20250510-8926&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8926%2E614464%2ETJGEc-)
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88449?refcode=em20250510-8926&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8926%2E614464%2ETJGEc-)
I brought that same commitment to collaboration and problem-solving to public service—first as Mayor of Denver, then as Governor, and now as your U.S. Senator.
**And together, we’ve gotten things done:**
* Lowering prescription drug costs and capping insulin prices
* Investing in clean energy and fighting climate change
* Defending reproductive rights against far-right attacks
* Boosting jobs and small businesses to keep Colorado’s economy strong

**But there’s still so much more to do—and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Trump and National Republicans are tearing apart our progress, and corporate special interests will spend millions to try and take this seat back.**
**[That’s why I need you in this fight. Will you split a donation now of $5—about the cost of two Wynkoop pints—to help us build a winning campaign?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88449?refcode=em20250510-8926&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=8926%2E614464%2ETJGEc-)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Donate $5 →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88450?refcode=em20250510-8926&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=6&akid=8926%2E614464%2ETJGEc-) [Donate another amount →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/88449?refcode=em20250510-8926&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=8926%2E614464%2ETJGEc-)
---
I know we can win this the Colorado way—by bringing people together and solving problems.
Thanks for being part of the team.
Giddy up,
John

clean_body: I'm running for re-election to the U.S. Senate in Colorado Hey Peter, I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate, and I hope you'll join me in the fight to give Colorado's priorities and values a voice in Washington. - - Before diving into the world of politics, I took a chance, like so many small business owners do, and opened Denver's very first brewpub: Wynkoop Brewing Company. At Wynkoop, we were known for our unique beers like the Timberland Pale and Sagebrush Stout, which we offered at just $2.25 per pint— a great deal compared to mainstream options! Wynkoop was more than just a brewpub for me. It was a place where people with diverse viewpoints could come together, united by a shared love of good beer. It was a community where we proved time and again that there’s hardly anything that can’t be sorted out over a refreshing pint. Below are some nostalgic photos from the Wynkoop’s early days! - - I brought that same commitment to collaboration and problem-solving to public service—first as Mayor of Denver, then as Governor, and now as your U.S. Senator. And together, we’ve gotten things done: Lowering prescription drug costs and capping insulin prices Investing in clean energy and fighting climate change Defending reproductive rights against far-right attacks Boosting jobs and small businesses to keep Colorado’s economy strong But there’s still so much more to do—and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Trump and National Republicans are tearing apart our progress, and corporate special interests will spend millions to try and take this seat back. - If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: - - I know we can win this the Colorado way—by bringing people together and solving problems. Thanks for being part of the team. Giddy up, John | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

[_**Can you split a donation of $5, $10, or $20, between my campaign and Mark Warner's to help us flip the Senate?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107449606/544718566/688952376?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_HickenlooperSplit_250510_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTM3ZDI1NS1hZDJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fmOiQeRzbJgPr1kHVKvG3RjHbroll3CPOmL9-i_gz0k=) [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107449607/544718567/688952376?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_HickenlooperSplit_250510_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTM3ZDI1NS1hZDJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fmOiQeRzbJgPr1kHVKvG3RjHbroll3CPOmL9-i_gz0k=) I know your inbox is probably full of these requests, but here’s why this is important:

**As a first-term senator, who flipped this seat from red-to-blue, I know that all eyes will be on us to see if we have the strength to win again and take back the Senate.**

We have one of the strongest grassroots teams in the country, and I’m so grateful you’re a part of it.

[_**Let’s show everyone what this team is made of. Split a donation of any amount you can before tonight and let’s send a message to prove how strong our grassroots team is →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107449608/544718568/688952376?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_HickenlooperSplit_250510_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTM3ZDI1NS1hZDJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fmOiQeRzbJgPr1kHVKvG3RjHbroll3CPOmL9-i_gz0k=)

Cheers Derek! Enjoy your weekend,

John [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107449609/544718569/688952376?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_HickenlooperSplit_250510_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTM3ZDI1NS1hZDJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fmOiQeRzbJgPr1kHVKvG3RjHbroll3CPOmL9-i_gz0k=)

name: Liz Urban
subject: Bless a mom in need this Mother’s Day
body:
Because I know that you are so dedicated to the mission of ending abortion and building a culture where every life is cherished, I want you to know about a special opportunity to bless mothers in need through Live Action.

| [ ](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/KWNHUT-n58p8z9oG9jPlfe6DMBZR-zyHomLFykpzkSzkPgt791D0W6Hd-fXww2ZlWP-_ZxPcSn4_ny0DPKzFFFayQaxAqZsazOCTziMYy7I1Qvf1NJap0DuCl7TOJmkUhlgMBo4eryY92n4wiJxlvIUZMkwnKUrRv9RoM4uVVa7miD5x2rdlBhnM6q-CKv_3P_QvQxjG59j-zHzG0cJv-pkeMwDQIBHhym_3DVi0_8Xc9n2sKz87zI89W0jgJpZAsdMG134DXA7vVavennRkhvwTDDxWWZ60k6APbdOdkWrH9zZgX-X7AHjxs0PADPj3dN0wxPiLHjxe2w90kgOUfZ1tgbXIrsPJrFzrvAsYKpA6KHUlSDMNq0_90qhZvDn9CjbBNcBrhKcwDJAz24A9MJQsNKdCP8fiLYL54CLA6w/v9I7z5JkR45iJMkxyO_t4uS8cZxxkslJ/8)

#
Dear Friend of Life,

Because I know that you are so dedicated to the mission of ending abortion and building a culture where every life is cherished, I want you to know about a **[special opportunity](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/Ai99o_JH4KX5O6FurSpPj3-Gdrgdy98v305_7oX1_wwsMMMizVmN8QuTkO9ZrTRnxczpXONi_D0lhTuS--spbGydZOheZVMiGhT9BcN0EkiyteUTsWFRC20ehboxymiTweuc8AQ7sZ_p0FPdgR1N1u5mkJ5CzB76gafZ_EnxzRcCn1Ji5I04N2lRpB3K_Ks8eanX4K0QFJ3190fCt_ehl2drZwOJ2SYkwuql2XWqVZ1foxzQ5Cnb8-_6pdfj8coVslU4mP_xBXYhhTSNMd3TXKgT9zFHzVlJCba4dRjS5WN_Xgk0MzZQKp5vg9mCn51Sp8SjythukicTfij9eZJasH8xXL9ULsoZMF01GAWdAIBNPqM76_lv4_rEJwnlg0GQOIkAb2OXMgK-QyIpgCNIQbEtXuTamUI5ONJGsX57gw/GOCtyJrQR-URj7ZjcZXNWybwzCYEFD9U/8)** to bless mothers in need through Live Action.

For women facing unexpected pregnancies, the journey of motherhood is too often a lonely and difficult one. I've heard this from so many mothers who have contacted Live Action for support.

Already this year, we have seen a major uptick in the number of women reaching out to us. Although counseling mothers is not the main mission of Live Action (other organizations cover that need), these women still seek us out for guidance because we are a trusted pro-life voice and reach a larger audience with the truth about abortion than any other pro-life organization.

Even after embracing life for their precious preborn babies, many women still face fear and uncertainty about the future. They need to know that both they and their babies are loved, valued, and cared for.

This Mother's Day, we want to do something special to meet this need, which is why we're partnering with pro-life pregnancy resource centers in Southern California to provide the mothers they serve with care packages to help them celebrate the gift of life.

**[Will you join us with a one-time gift of $65 to send a care package to a mother in need this Mother 's Day?](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/DPqBt6G1K8Xh69jI2hraBZiuumPfKfIeJeo1nn2T8d54vLoJENeTZ3iV5B4V1NoI0Veky1xLaFVhyukc2y8jsWf8-46tPoeBSbpkUrbRqruZCKS16yciovSgZThMH4ZQJ1BDixG8zQujK_8ZHsVF4TLR7fBhXwpRF7NDwX69Au3qXYXkefuj7HuJWFqcoy_e5ToluB03r92lWnm_emU9mWs_45uBRZDkG3pvzCliu0sPT4L6Y-kkl1fONnQUnDQAWXUDMLLsh8hCMfrTfNja2Sd7HX0d-V7dmZiNuBVxM_jLCE-WYmm7FbjWAONZNmsKvVCjy7qDnXRJoVjzE56-pHNEVzD-fSIeMTIK_w9DeudWeOfRhhvwbixG-Wvg849oyT9MMzbNTYZRWfiOTnlkCzjkIb0DJUsghCbPUoBZvw/JcoIgGy0OLs1OsG19LNYVmTEkOm7uNNx/8)**

These care packages have been thoughtfully designed to celebrate both mother and baby. Each one contains:
* 10 EveryLife diapers
* A pack of EveryLife wipes
* A "Wonderfully Made" onesie
* A "Love Them Both" teddy bear
* A "Precious Feet" pin
* A bag of Seven Weeks coffee
* An exclusive Live Action "Mama" mug
* A "Window to the Womb" pamphlet

All of these items will be delivered inside a beautiful "it is good that you exist" tote bag to remind these mothers that their lives and the lives of their preborn babies are wonderful, unrepeatable gifts!

**Part of your donation will also go towards Live Action 's mission to help change minds and save lives. Click here to provide a care package and help save lives: [give.liveaction.org/send-a-care-package](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/VhmpQeVdDmZZ2VAZsO4LTf6WG8IMGFj6AdTdhqg4zdblHzAd0ipgfEBiMUrtS1VmlRAzpVPnfcDS08K3vbN9UruupyVr-dq4PDeXbbtsrX7IVOgmQMWSHoqU5j4r4eJ2DVPKDktQVxknotJabjH0YRHmuipWpu6uqwOPyLTsraHZ1D_YQRKQXS4VIZiDCT-iWHjpO3RuRA41UnX0dF775bv45_wJeO4TdWgOMAZdXlQ09bystnWC1u6P58EFWOwkbqupkjueUCBEeZPvhlVBTzIYOOQYnIxbP1pjJobig4WOYXLwOojyS_twFup0ORH0MEKoB0xdUt9E3FiZm0nhlHxOtnwM1P9MAguB4HmAROOkXzsDZUfRhsv6BE5Dahc6q2-D1I1yd6VKVe1dEOZMB39uG0YZ7fPAqSMhzRC1vQ/jwuWlarfn93v0CYph0MOUjFwSyt82eO_/8)**

Thank you for your heart for mothers and babies and for your steadfast support of this life-saving mission.**
**
For Life,

Liz Urban
**Donor Service Manager**

[](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/J_pcoaTnGGoTMcnC8wF4f3qL9IItI2x9Ch75Py5Cx16Iv7-NnsLWk23pTgpE_r8Qco7Y3VL_popsuPcCwqZAWlrkFE1AvDAAXco9FfpgiOnAKiPdbSjTipDyFzrVw0CbyJ5Cr1WD4MF5rHII9U4zOgyc5yxwmgU3XyjN2XH9RXZuCirLdj_QUCBF-RFNo_ughFgA5XAEuqm_WArMSzDjMlKeTO8J9pZoo0Y6gvg2Nsbv-PAeHgtwENPnq6hfISExEmzRJHVLwtaUylMCAfkUY6B61V_CH3KTUi2UlEiH703fmR__L9pvcKHDJ5ixmXrDFxdBKYpk9HHx7VpULrysB-9CNSu7o9JxzDhQP8p-fe04lWPKGL8hty8JxWkoxJscwy5ilXout6Mjbq5VMKqRvFL_f9ubULpXi4hZaXlSXg/dDKGC71tKLuRdSAc0EZq1DYWRuneoIU_/8)

name: Andy Kim
subject: Trump is trying to gut the CFPB, which protects Americans from getting scammed and ripped off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
The CFPB works to prevent unfair lending practices, address issues like predatory loans, and promote transparency in the marketplace.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107451563/544721429/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZWU3MDk2Zi1hZjJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mqt3e5WeNmEqmSm87i2v36eHn-7A4-pAG-cua7s0BjQ=&emci=0b49482b-4f2b-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=5ee7096f-af2d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=26261389)
---

| | The Trump administration is trying to gut the workforce at the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB), which protects Americans from getting scammed and ripped off. The CFPB works to prevent unfair lending practices, address issues like predatory loans, and promote transparency in the marketplace. It is our financial watchdog, and it's responsible for returning millions of dollars back to Americans from scams and financial mismanagement. It's not surprising people like Elon Musk and Donald Trump want to shut the CFPB down. They've been telling people they want to "eliminate waste," but the reality is that they're just looking to halt anything that gets in their way of giving tax cuts to the rich, giving corporations free rein to do whatever they please, and creating corruption by giving their allies preferential treatment. Congress created the CFPB and must defend it. **In the Senate, I'm working to stop Trump's assault on American consumers.** I will do everything in my power to ensure the CFPB continues its important work and delivers results to everyday Americans. We must not stand for this blatant abuse of power from the Trump administration. More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Andy Kim instantly:

name: Powered By People
subject: Republicans fear Trump more than they fear their constituents. We need to change that.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
Action is the antidote to despair and the key to victory.
#
Conventional political wisdom says that campaigns are all about showing off the candidate, tightly controlled, and focused only on those voters you think you need to win.
This moment is anything but conventional - we can’t just preach to the choir and we can’t wait until 2026.
That’s why Powered by People is holding town halls _across_ the state to bring Texans together.
[**Can you chip in $3 to keep us organizing these transformative events?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250510.BDnBR1&refcode=ema20250510-240105&t=1&akid=240105%2E444211%2Ej2CiAB)
At our town halls, we don't check for party affiliation. We don't pre-screen questions. Anyone who has anything they want to say is able to do that.
Republicans have taken advantage of people’s _isolation and fear_. We’re doing the long-term work of bringing Texans together, listening to them, and providing a forum for _them_ to find each other and build power.
Action like this is the antidote to fear and the key to victory. [**Can you chip in $3 to keep us reaching people? Your donation will help us organize town halls, train deputy registrars, and bring voters together who have been written off.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250510.BDnBR1&refcode=ema20250510-240105&t=2&akid=240105%2E444211%2Ej2CiAB)
This is a moment of truth for this country, and we can not be found waiting. Let’s get to work.
— Powered by People

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20250510-240105-footer&t=3&refcode2=240105_444211_j2CiAB&akid=240105%2E444211%2Ej2CiAB)**
Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople.org](http://www.poweredxpeople.org?akid=240105%2E444211%2Ej2CiAB), not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We are powered by grassroots supporters like you. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=240105%2E444211%2Ej2CiAB).

name: The Democratic Party
subject: Good morning, Derek →
body:
Please don’t scroll past this short read.
---
️Good morning, Derek — we hope you won’t scroll past this short read. It’s Saturday, May 10. We’re just over 100 days into Trump’s presidency, and the consequences have been disastrous: He’s ignored a unanimous order from the Supreme Court, enacted tariffs that will skyrocket costs, and allowed an unelected billionaire to dismantle key government agencies and fire thousands of federal workers. _And that was just the first 100 days._ Republicans have proven they won’t check Trump’s power — so we need to elect more Democrats who will. To do that, we’re investing in every single state party, sending $1 million a month to Democrats across the country who are doing on-the-ground organizing work and laying the groundwork to win future elections in their communities. That’s the only way we’ll elect more Democrats at all levels of government — and it’s only possible with your help. We’re counting on all Democrats who know how important this moment is to step up to support this work. [**If fighting back against Trump and electing Democrats at all levels of government is worth $3 to you, then we’re asking you to make that contribution today. If you’re on the fence, please remember any contribution makes an impact when the stakes are so high and we have work to fund in every single state.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250510_3370_fr&refcode2=3370_22930333_tpqOIX&akid=3370%2E22930333%2EtpqOIX)

This is crazy,It's a 100% legal and legit "trick" to get your [Concealed Carry certificate online.](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21510/6374453/c5f33b096cf4c80e569a57e5ad8a45742125a1e4/3b08bf994f6a2efde11e019bdc869f0d6da56176) [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21510/6374453/a112553fbe6f69d03ab15814a82e3c37c58af4f6/3b08bf994f6a2efde11e019bdc869f0d6da56176)Even better...It only takes about 30 minutes.Plus it's...

\- All from home- Avoiding government agencies \- Zero range time \- No police station visit \- No fingerprinting or photograph required

[>> Get your Concealed Carry Permit in 30 Minutes](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21510/6374453/c5f33b096cf4c80e569a57e5ad8a45742125a1e4/3b08bf994f6a2efde11e019bdc869f0d6da56176) [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21510/6374453/a112553fbe6f69d03ab15814a82e3c37c58af4f6/3b08bf994f6a2efde11e019bdc869f0d6da56176)Be warned though...Some liberal lawmakers are trying to shut this site down. If/when that happens, you won't be able to get this online CCW certification any more. So I'd recommend [doing this now](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/21510/6374453/c5f33b096cf4c80e569a57e5ad8a45742125a1e4/3b08bf994f6a2efde11e019bdc869f0d6da56176) if you're interested.I hope you check this out! Stay Prepared,
Josh

name: Katie Porter for Governor
subject: What makes us different
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Katie’s never taken corporate money, and she’s not starting now
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39711%2E3422442%2E8iHao-)
Dear Derek,
Since Katie was first elected in 2018 in a historically Republican area, she’s refused corporate PAC money.
But, did you know that the 2024 election cycle was the first one in which we saw a decrease in the number of candidates refusing corporate donations?
Even as other politicians are taking us backwards on campaign finance, Katie is staying true to the promises she made to voters since her very first election.
Our campaign is 100% grassroots. We reject money from corporations, lobbyists, and executives at Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Big Banks.
**[That does mean that the only way we win is with folks like you chipping in $5, $10, or more to support our work. Will you donate today to our fully grassroots campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250510_1_ak?refcode=em20250510-39711&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39711_3422442_8iHao-&akid=39711%2E3422442%2E8iHao-)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250510_1_ak?refcode=em20250510-39711&refcode2=39711_3422442_8iHao-&akid=39711%2E3422442%2E8iHao-)
Thank you,
Team KP

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250510-39711&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39711_3422442_8iHao-&akid=39711%2E3422442%2E8iHao-)**

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: Our educators deserve the world
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107454019/544728260/-1295403277?refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250510_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjlhYmJhZC1iMTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N1aRpsA-5VFjCzhN1m8KarN0VH5DVpNeNXF7DERqccE=&emci=09e21a10-262c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=af9abbad-b12d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=15529135) | Team — When I decided to go to community college to become a teacher, _I did not tell anyone._ Honestly? I was afraid to fail. It was hard, but I did not fail. I persevered. And became the teacher I had always aspired to be. For 15 years, I woke up before the sun rose and made my way to my classroom to shape the minds of the next generation. I was even named the National Teacher of the Year in 2016. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107454020/544728261/-1233556125?refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250510_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjlhYmJhZC1iMTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N1aRpsA-5VFjCzhN1m8KarN0VH5DVpNeNXF7DERqccE=&emci=09e21a10-262c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=af9abbad-b12d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=15529135) The lessons I learned as an educator are lessons I carry with me today. I have seen how a quality education can lift people out of a poverty cycle and put them on a pathway to success. Teachers are a crucial part of communities nationwide. But the thing is, we are in a new era where teachers do not feel rewarded for the work they do in the classroom. They are underpaid and overworked. They are often coming out of pocket to pay for classroom supplies. Class sizes are growing as teachers leave the profession. **And we cannot count on the Trump administration to fix this problem.** From slashing the Department of Education to reducing state and local funding for schools and more, the GOP is hurting our kids. **I am fighting back — because we need to support our schools. ** **[As a member of the House Committee on Education and Workforce, I am fighting every day to deliver for our teachers and our students. Will you add your name right now and stand with me in support of our educators?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107454021/544728262/-1233556125?contactdata=mziqP3kPkzokc4ak/8GBm7rj3NMIxaEbo+JAWvGKyE0M+FP/ENSdAVtr3nLoi86AoaJG5dX9SLFY/FhQ/c+rBUfPurcdFCEgWqU6FQOnYg8yQtvHDwYJXeoQt90Dl6XCui9tHT1IUQ0+fe5LWs70+g==&refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250510_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjlhYmJhZC1iMTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N1aRpsA-5VFjCzhN1m8KarN0VH5DVpNeNXF7DERqccE=&emci=09e21a10-262c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=af9abbad-b12d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=15529135)** | [ADD YOUR NAME »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107454022/544728263/-1233556125?contactdata=mziqP3kPkzokc4ak/8GBm7rj3NMIxaEbo+JAWvGKyE0M+FP/ENSdAVtr3nLoi86AoaJG5dX9SLFY/FhQ/c+rBUfPurcdFCEgWqU6FQOnYg8yQtvHDwYJXeoQt90Dl6XCui9tHT1IUQ0+fe5LWs70+g==&refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250510_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjlhYmJhZC1iMTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N1aRpsA-5VFjCzhN1m8KarN0VH5DVpNeNXF7DERqccE=&emci=09e21a10-262c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=af9abbad-b12d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=15529135)

I have seen the things our students face, and I faced those same things as a student myself. My educational journey was not linear, and I know how important it is to have the support to navigate your pathway to success.
Teachers deserve so much more than we are currently giving them, and I will always fight for the dignity our teachers deserve.
Thanks for your support today,
Jahana

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23052%2E4449941%2EA7h_Ve) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23052%2E4449941%2EA7h_Ve) [ **NEW FROM _NEWSWEEK_ -- "Donald Trump's Approval Rating Is Underwater in Florida and Texas"**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61122?t=3&akid=23052%2E4449941%2EA7h_Ve)

This week, Trump addressed a joint session of Congress on the state of our union, and spewed lies about how "great" a president he's been.

[**We need to know, team, how would you grade Donald Trump as Commander-in-Chief?](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61122?t=4&akid=23052%2E4449941%2EA7h_Ve)** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61122?t=5&akid=23052%2E4449941%2EA7h_Ve)
| | [HORRIBLE >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61122?t=6&akid=23052%2E4449941%2EA7h_Ve)
---
| [BAD >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61122?t=7&akid=23052%2E4449941%2EA7h_Ve)
---
| [AVERAGE >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61122?t=8&akid=23052%2E4449941%2EA7h_Ve)
---
| [GOOD >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61122?t=9&akid=23052%2E4449941%2EA7h_Ve)
---
| [AMAZING >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61122?t=10&akid=23052%2E4449941%2EA7h_Ve)
---
Look, you know Trump is unhinged, but look at what exactly he's done in just his first weeks:
1. Threatened to invade THREE different countries.

2. Threatened to annex Canada and make it the 51st state.

3. Slapped 25% tariffs on Canada and Mexico.

4. Worked to dismantle USAID's critical work across the world.

5. Attacked the State Department's work on human rights around the world.

6. Paused crucial military aid to Ukraine after Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy spoke up against Trump and Vance lies and bully tactics at the White House

_Trump 's careless antics are absolutely destroying America's reputation, which could have material and economic impacts that would be devastating for everyday Americans!_

We think that Donald Trump is the **WORST** Commander-in-Chief we've seen in modern history.

But, we have no clue what Democrats in your area think?!
[**Confirm: How would you grade Donald Trump as Commander-in-Chief?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61122?t=11&akid=23052%2E4449941%2EA7h_Ve)

body:
Winning in Michigan is absolutely necessary

| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2481?t=1&akid=103%2E49239%2ExoOASc)
---
Can you believe what’s happening in Michigan, Null?
* Congresswoman Haley Stevens just launched her campaign to be Michigan’s next U.S. senator and help take back the majority for Democrats!
* Last year, Donald Trump and his allies spent nearly $80 million trying to buy Michigan’s open Senate seat for their handpicked MAGA candidate, Mike Rogers. They failed but got within striking distance – falling just 19,006 votes short.
* Now, _The Cook Political Report_ is rating Michigan’s 2026 Senate race a “Toss Up.” Mike Rogers has already announced he’s running again, and experts expect Trump to tap into his **half-a-billion-dollar** war chest to help Rogers win and flip Michigan totally red.

**Winning in Michigan is absolutely necessary for Democrats to take back Senate control – full stop. But Democrat Haley Stevens still needs to close the gap on her goal.[_Will you chip in $5 or more right now – whatever you can – to help Democrat Haley Stevens win Michigan’s battleground Senate race so we can take back the Senate for Democrats and stop Donald Trump’s extreme agenda?_](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2486?t=2&akid=103%2E49239%2ExoOASc)**

Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you chip in now to keep Michigan blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2481?t=7&akid=103%2E49239%2ExoOASc) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/2481?t=8&akid=103%2E49239%2ExoOASc)

name: Ritchie
subject: Target on my back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress
body:
Peter, it’s Ritchie. I’ve spent my time in Congress fighting for working families, Social Security, affordable housing, LGBTQ+ rights, and more.
While I wouldn’t change a thing about this grassroots movement, my common-sense, democratic agenda has put a target on my back...
Look, Peter: MAGA Republicans are in the majority AND on offense, and they are threatened by our people-powered movement!
❌ If we can’t keep up with fundraising, that will invite more attacks from the MAGA mob. They want to destroy everything I’m fighting for!
✅ But if we report strong numbers, we’ll have the support we need to handle whatever the GOP throws our way. That’s why I have to ask:
We’re still a whopping $2,497 short of our mid-quarter goal, with just 5 days to go. Can you chip in $3 to help me hit this critical goal and protect my agenda in Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_torres_q22025_df-goal?amount=3]

Thank you,
Ritchie

----------------------------------------
Paid for by Torres For Congress

PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
www.torres.nyc

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

---
* * *
Donald Trump’s administration just took another disturbing step to centralize power — **and this time, your personal data is on the line.**
Under DOGE, the Trump administration wants to consolidate unprecedented amounts of federal data into a single system. That includes Social Security numbers, tax filings, immigration records, and even personal medical information.
**It’s a privacy nightmare, and a political weapon in the making.**
Cybersecurity experts and former federal officials are already sounding the alarm: This centralized database would create massive vulnerabilities, especially in the hands of a leader like Trump, who’s shown time and again that he’s willing to abuse power for personal gain.
What happens when a system like this is used to target immigrants, suppress voters, or punish political enemies?
**We’ve seen the warning signs. Now we need to act.**
Democratic Secretaries of State are standing up for our privacy, voting rights, and democracy — and they need backup. Every signature helps us show the public is paying attention.
[**That’s why we’re asking you to add your name now and DEMAND Congress stop Trump’s dangerous new data surveillance plan:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107455304/544731403/-264513102?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MGRkYjIwOS1iNDJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Es-hupUlBFIvISjJKl-aeHF8kCqGhnjY9v_Eyt5vJvA=&emci=b8e69293-cb2c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=90ddb209-b42d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=26828920)

clean_body: | = ➤➤ Trump proposal would centralize sensitive voter data | | Donald Trump’s administration just took another disturbing step to centralize power — and this time, your personal data is on the line. Under DOGE, the Trump administration wants to consolidate unprecedented amounts of federal data into a single system. That includes Social Security numbers, tax filings, immigration records, and even personal medical information. It’s a privacy nightmare, and a political weapon in the making. Cybersecurity experts and former federal officials are already sounding the alarm: This centralized database would create massive vulnerabilities, especially in the hands of a leader like Trump, who’s shown time and again that he’s willing to abuse power for personal gain. What happens when a system like this is used to target immigrants, suppress voters, or punish political enemies? We’ve seen the warning signs. Now we need to act. Democratic Secretaries of State are standing up for our privacy, voting rights, and democracy — and they need backup. Every signature helps us show the public is paying attention. | Thank you for speaking up, Team DASS | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. Right now, Republicans are changing the rules and changing the players to try and change the outcomes of future elections. Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense to protect our democracy and preserve the will of the voters. Please consider a donation to fight back against the GOP's voter suppression agenda. | = = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill Democratic Association of Secretaries of State 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

But that hasn’t come without challenges. As a mom, it’s really hard to see your child become a target of attacks from far-right billionaires. And as a retired special education teacher, it’s really hard to see the attacks on our education system – like Trump and Elon dismantling the Education Department. I’ve seen firsthand how underfunded our schools already were. I’m scared to see how much worse it will get. But it gives me so much hope to see young people like my son demanding change. And I’m so proud that Maxwell and his team are fighting back for working people everywhere. **Peter, while he’s out there on the frontlines speaking up and taking action, it’s his supporters behind the scenes, like you and me, that make the fight for progress possible.** [**_The less time Maxwell spends worrying about funding his campaign, the more time he can spend keeping this movement for change and progress going. name: Supervisor David Canepa
subject: Join us at "Celebrating Our Story" on 5/15 – RSVP or Update Your Guest Count
body:
| | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e20cb8a41ef1/join-us-at-celebrating-our-story-on-515-rsvp-or-update-your-guest-count?e=c0babbc643)
---
| | | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
#### Join us:

**May 15th, 2025 in Redwood City**
---
| | |
---
| | | | Hi friends, We’re getting close to **Celebrating Our Story **— happening **Thursday, May 15th at 5:00 PM** at **San Mateo County History Museum** , and we’d love for you to join us! If you’ve already RSVP’d — thank you! If you’re bringing guests, please take a moment to confirm how many will be attending with you by sending a [message to Mike in my Office](mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org?subject=Confirming%20my%20RSVP%20and%20guest\(s\)). If you haven’t RSVP’d yet, there’s still time! [E-mail Brad in my Office](mailto:bmurdock@smcgov.org?subject=RSVP%20for%20May%2015th). This is going to be a fun and historic gathering — we hope to see you there! In friendship,
**DAVID J. CANEPA**
President, San Mateo County Board of Supervisors
**************
**Celebrating Our Story**

San Mateo County and the San Mateo County History Museum cordially invite you to attend the 169th Anniversary of San Mateo County and the Dedication and Unveiling Ceremony for 500 County Center.

**_Schedule_**
_**5:00 p.m.:**_
Gather at the San Mateo County History Museum (2200 Broadway, Redwood City) for a program exploring the County's start with reenactors and live music.

_**5:30 p.m.:**_
Procession Led by the **[Woodside High School marching band](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=1bc45c6689&e=c0babbc643)** to 500 County Center for Dedication and Unveiling of the new building.

_**6:00 p.m.:**_
• Enjoy a short video of the building and explore the lobby and board chambers.
• Explore the county's past with kids' crafts.
• Live music by DJ John Beaver

Thursday,
May 15, 2025
FREE Event Parking at the San Mateo County Jury Parking Garage
(400 Middlefield Road, Redwood City)

Kindly RSVP by May 12, 2025.
bmurdock@smcgov.org or 650-363-4572
[](mailto:bmurdock@smcgov.org?subject=RSVP%20for%20May%2015th.)
[](mailto:bmurdock@smcgov.org?subject=RSVP%20for%20May%2015th.)

[A post shared by David Canepa (@davidcanepa)](https://davidcanepa.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a3c7592558e548bc8cc150aa5&id=82bfca8f23&e=c0babbc643)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Join us: May 15th, 2025 in Redwood City | | | | | | | Hi friends, We’re getting close to Celebrating Our Story — happening Thursday, May 15th at 5:00 PM at San Mateo County History Museum , and we’d love for you to join us! If you’ve already RSVP’d — thank you! If you’re bringing guests, please take a moment to confirm how many will be attending with you by sending a mailto:mrichardson@smcgov.org?subject=Confirming%20my%20RSVP%20and%20guest\(s\). If you haven’t RSVP’d yet, there’s still time! mailto:bmurdock@smcgov.org?subject=RSVP%20for%20May%2015th. This is going to be a fun and historic gathering — we hope to see you there! In friendship, DAVID J. CANEPA President, San Mateo County Board of Supervisors Celebrating Our Story San Mateo County and the San Mateo County History Museum cordially invite you to attend the 169th Anniversary of San Mateo County and the Dedication and Unveiling Ceremony for 500 County Center. Schedule 5:00 p.m.: Gather at the San Mateo County History Museum (2200 Broadway, Redwood City) for a program exploring the County's start with reenactors and live music. 5:30 p.m.: Procession Led by the to 500 County Center for Dedication and Unveiling of the new building. 6:00 p.m.: • Enjoy a short video of the building and explore the lobby and board chambers. • Explore the county's past with kids' crafts. • Live music by DJ John Beaver Thursday, May 15, 2025 FREE Event Parking at the San Mateo County Jury Parking Garage (400 Middlefield Road, Redwood City) Kindly RSVP by May 12, 2025. bmurdock@smcgov.org or 650-363-4572 mailto:bmurdock@smcgov.org?subject=RSVP%20for%20May%2015th. mailto:bmurdock@smcgov.org?subject=RSVP%20for%20May%2015th. | | | | | Copyright © 2025 Supervisor David Canepa, All rights reserved.

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: President Trump said it best…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Democrats think they’ve found a bulletproof loophole...
| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=319fbb2b8c6248918fb03101b1d28f0c&_e=95Oj6RbmAm52_7rvp5kNZLlVXhUsh9CIrajzuGWlvKWD3hcLC8RD9DdbOYExgPT8mVJ9dZ9yol3tHMiUyuVrNFlowVEIuHbU6F-fnuYACU2Kccj2CHtBPdEAzKtbC3-9UCBBmJW2AA2y_-EKHO7PIStlIdjuiOiDkiTBU8gb1wNLuuH4C9U-brfjVHVKqmfZOPWVGE96EiW3YRZ1QbaAjcFH9JNYd1Jcge8qFHINFFX2a_DLapTHe-6yJMADvoNOxGxeCAi7i2KO0TerRsaaXYrE_1yR0tH-iU8WLPEsD7M-desjtQcaBxQWWg4bjkC2C7yvqUwWYRfMAwPvNYN04aYfKeiiZXFmjR-QZtUAwHMbpENTFdnYqwg-l5lWF9RT)
---
Fellow Patriot,
---
For the sake of my life, I hope to God they’re wrong...
---
...But Democrats believe they’ve finally found the bulletproof loophole to send me to prison until I’m 100 years old.
---
Because the Constitution doesn’t give the President the power to issue pardons for _state-level_ crimes, a corrupt Democrat Attorney General is forcing me to stand trial in _state_ court so that President Trump cannot save me from this grave injustice.
---
But of course President Trump isn’t just going to roll over to the Left. Since _he_ knows he cannot save me with a pardon, he’s calling on _YOU_ to join the cause to save me.
---

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=319fbb2b8c6248918fb03101b1d28f0c&_e=95Oj6RbmAm52_7rvp5kNZLlVXhUsh9CIrajzuGWlvKWD3hcLC8RD9DdbOYExgPT8mVJ9dZ9yol3tHMiUyuVrNFlowVEIuHbU6F-fnuYACU2Kccj2CHtBPdEAzKtbC3-9UCBBmJW2AA2y_-EKHO7PIStlIdjuiOiDkiTBU8gb1wNLuuH4C9U-brfjVHVKqmfZOPWVGE96EiW3YRZ1QbaAjcFH9JNYd1Jcge8qFHINFFXkeWxW6VpYCAQ9jqz5zMTHQhBtV8iQWJFLcLKhP3Wt2flPI4k_FXaBLqK2S6KfxMmutQ_EpuTwT9zTan_Q_PVNAAxvLTTAbLnHbf6gGZ6Gea7rbNck77_IDHCGjT-eywspo7tdKP2aub91l1WRq1ln)
__
---

Back in 2021, after the Biden FBI raided my home, the media pronounced me a “ _DEAD_ _MAN_ _WALKING_.”
---
**And yet, despite all odds against me, here I am – ALIVE and _FIGHTING_. We’ve won _every_ single battle up until now.**
---
_How did we win?_ The same way President Trump won the White House despite four sham arrests, a felony conviction, and an assassin’s bullet... thanks to _YOU_.
---
**Patriots like _you_ refused to surrender our country to a corrupt Deep State hellbent on using lawfare to overthrow our Free Republic.**
---
But now I’m in my final fight that will determine whether I spend 20 years in a prison cell or if I live as a free man.
---
That’s why I now have no choice but to set a goal to raise $50,000 before week’s end for my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can continue fighting to remain a FREE man.
---
I hate reaching out like this, and this is difficult for me to say, but right now, my fate is truly in _your_ hands.
---
Don’t just take my word for it. President Trump knows how grave this is. And now I am **_humbly_** echoing the President’s call to “save” me.

Patriots like you refused to surrender our country to a corrupt Deep State hellbent on using lawfare to overthrow our Free Republic. But now I’m in my final fight that will determine whether I spend 20 years in a prison cell or if I live as a free man. name: AOTL
subject: re: The SAVE Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
This legislation threatens the right to vote for millions of voters
|
---

Peter,
Right now, we’re facing one of the most dangerous threats to voting rights we’ve seen in decades:
_**FIRST:**_ Anti-democracy conservatives in Congress introduced the SAVE Act — a bill that would disenfranchise millions of Americans by requiring overly burdensome and costly forms of ID to register to vote.
_**THEN:**_ The House of Representatives narrowly passed the SAVE Act — threatening to make it harder for military voters, rural voters, tribal citizens, survivors of natural disasters, people of color, working-class Americans, married women, and more to exercise their right to vote.
**_NOW:_** **We need to come together to stop the SAVE Act in the Senate.**

clean_body: This legislation threatens the right to vote for millions of voters | Peter, Right now, we’re facing one of the most dangerous threats to voting rights we’ve seen in decades: FIRST: Anti-democracy conservatives in Congress introduced the SAVE Act — a bill that would disenfranchise millions of Americans by requiring overly burdensome and costly forms of ID to register to vote. THEN: The House of Representatives narrowly passed the SAVE Act — threatening to make it harder for military voters, rural voters, tribal citizens, survivors of natural disasters, people of color, working-class Americans, married women, and more to exercise their right to vote. NOW: We need to come together to stop the SAVE Act in the Senate. All On The Line is mobilizing voters across the country to speak out against this dangerous bill and demand that their senators reject it.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = For years, All On The Line has responded at a moment’s notice when anti-democracy extremists threaten voting rights. And it’s never been more important than it is today. The SAVE Act could disenfranchise about 150 million Americans — half of American citizens — folks who don’t have a passport, people who’ve lost original documents to time or natural disaster, and not to mention the millions of married women who took their spouse’s last name. This is an existential moment for voting rights in America. **But here's the thing: No matter how much Trump attacks me, no matter what this administration throws my way, I am committed to standing my ground and upholding the rule of law.**

But I need you with me.

With fearless fighters like you behind me, we’ve taken the Trump administration to court time and again – and won.

We stopped his attempt to gut birthright citizenship.

We defended civil rights and reproductive freedom.
**He’s furious because we’ve been effective. And now, he wants revenge.**

Grassroots supporters like you have always had my back. You’ve helped me stand strong, speak truth to power, and deliver real wins for justice – and for that, I can't thank you enough. **But with Trump ramping up his attacks, I need you with me now more than ever.**

name: Giffords.org
subject: Only 15% of people will open this email.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Seriously.
#

Team --
We can’t thank you enough for reading these emails, and we know that we’ve sent you a lot recently. Let us explain why.
Every day, the gun lobby is trying to find new ways to tear down our movement. Having strong support of this email program is one of the most powerful ways to fight back.
When folks pitch in a few dollars, sign our petitions, or even just click emails like this one, you’re making a statement that you have Gabby’s back. Because while the gun lobby can get their well-connected friends to bankroll their work, we rely on donations from these emails to keep our fundraising on track.
We know these asks can be annoying, but they make a big difference. We simply could not stand up to the Trump administration, elect leaders who will take on the gun lobby, or work to pass commonsense legislation without donations from emails like this one.
But here’s the truth: For every email we send, only about 15% of people will open them. Even fewer donate.
_So we hope you understand why we have to ask:_
[**Can you pitch in $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today? If even just a quarter of the people reading this donated, we would be well ahead of our May fundraising goal. We know not everyone can, which is why we’re hoping you can help.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-may25.7MLdP7&refcode=em250510-1-b&t=1&akid=10412%2E3935704%2EgObduf)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

body:
Your 2025 Trump-Voter Census is INCOMPLETE!
| ATTN: Friend
---
The **[2025 Trump-Voter Census](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=299d0780d4cf4821a7f7d591d77df63d&_e=wMF7RoY8W_K7ppPCWlMOvA7btzht2tVcXDnpsv5EzzgUn6xtkGL6cGduf22iBRtk-1v2vjyVQHDyL4N81aWmeQiI89QG6RuqbH7M5_JV_6voV5YrGULLtz4mOOHa8NL6BExPyjGL1lQGDPcOJlUAd8ga5Y13WUPfl8xw6lp7vsWXQ2GCwWFhNaJW86BiCJGFDieIJ1i-JyozM-DAwGot5uot3pec5MawAjanHPMFzM88IxXN1no1-czVvW9B-RExcnR0aSGosQ1sQEdUAoBAfrhX0j0BuCZGiM2eU8-6EEGU0Gd2RWufmprQichMVGV7RLas9yWtCBIy9TvzAgQL3s-34LoNw6NI6-SdcMol2tw%3D)** is one of our most important surveys we’ll ever send you.
---
**_The responses help us determine both our messaging and where we should allocate valuable campaign resources for the midterms!_**
---
To ensure our data is as accurate as possible, we’ve set an ambitious goal of securing **50,000,000** responses from America First patriots by the end of the month.
---
_But as of our last review, you were among the few grassroots conservatives in the your area whose census was still marked as_** _INCOMPLETE!_**
---
_We simply couldn't let another day pass without reaching out and asking you to complete this critical survey as soon as possible, Friend._
---

name: Royce White
subject: We must never roll over
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE
body:
If we do, America is in TROUBLE | [ ](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=6baa68af6ba1406f9df20d1daba187d5&_e=6GNWp3gMvl9Lw42SHlzKfvvEIvsSbpFQp3Iz28253Ax1YSthizuQ4nVIynjMJ9AiLVAzzifWC20qsn9AdEuxDJzAy9XH-UjB1nePp2_4ZjDstitv-rHYX96fuROnLKrQC7EJSHW5Zdq0CNM4BcISpizEES9gep9OVxKc6ekjJL89EaWQXlP122J6wd-k5IbjBHKVkpkAvQEFmegzlguUJLVeWJl1nKqNKUOteQ4YIT93O8EW6rg5uMwCGid36noK7dsKfZlLyZKWoPnSpQPE6k_BvibrCQFXxsG9msdwCjOUV2Ce_7cPdOoBJshKGpaA41wL2PTCklZwAQyK83-wXQ%3D%3D)
---

Peter,

We must never roll over to the Radical Left, the Globalist Establishment, or the Media Industrial Complex.

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=6baa68af6ba1406f9df20d1daba187d5&_e=6GNWp3gMvl9Lw42SHlzKfvvEIvsSbpFQp3Iz28253Ax1YSthizuQ4nVIynjMJ9AiLVAzzifWC20qsn9AdEuxDJzAy9XH-UjB1nePp2_4ZjDstitv-rHYX96fuROnLKrQtSJpnVU5FRCHUnpRUuHuKAScIWfef2T6ys9Mu9yIy8NLo_QReLei-ksF0MMZc86w9U5g6pfVNeX7YV3KZLbIyD_PmQFZX-xwjYx3qdYw7ap6v_Xt-XqfdQ4GtajEieL3d3eD0ymky-NiUUeu9w_u2R3iJyncbu-91o3TTBmj1L-BSDkg8ZUOlYJ3kP-YWn3CmHz44a-9viuIxk89PZJR_w%3D%3D)

This is the America that the Radical Left wants us to become. A bunch of loser furries who act like dogs while the Government descends us into socialism and communism.

If we roll over, we’ll never live in a free society again.

_They tried to import illegal Democrat voters by the millions.

They tried to force us to acknowledge over 60 pronouns to appease a couple of thousand mentally sick people.

They tried to assassinate President Trump more than once because they knew it was their only way to save their Woke Globalist Agenda.

_ I’m running for United States Senate so that America NEVER rolls over to the globalists and neocons. But I need your help.

**They have access to the billionaire Deep State Donors who will do EVERYTHING in their power to make sure I never win.**

The establishment Republicans are more scared of me than Ilhan Omar and AOC. THAT’S the state of our GOP in today’s day and age – they’d rather help Radical Leftists than a Black Republican.

**That’s why I need your help. If you won’t help me, no one will.**

[**Can you chip in $10 before my midnight deadline to help me beat Radical Leftist Peggy Flanagan?**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=6baa68af6ba1406f9df20d1daba187d5&_e=6GNWp3gMvl9Lw42SHlzKfvvEIvsSbpFQp3Iz28253Ax1YSthizuQ4nVIynjMJ9AiLVAzzifWC20qsn9AdEuxDJzAy9XH-UjB1nePp2_4ZjDstitv-rHYX96fuROnLKrQC7EJSHW5Zdq0CNM4BcISpizEES9gep9OVxKc6ekjJL89EaWQXlP122J6wd-k5Ibj7Lt_VHkaJ-w9fmgXwy9ZpsB95zY-WkCfygh13Chcl5fo8EpwK-_Zgr6QrckCYGpZrzTU4lTBn6UoIR0KQBLhFcVq2wm6gUuW7yHcceX8BYwosRG-RS90_2KaIExRgaH3ej_pNTTsOCKOeUX0TxF8EA%3D%3D)

The People Are Coming!
Royce White

| [](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=6baa68af6ba1406f9df20d1daba187d5&_e=6GNWp3gMvl9Lw42SHlzKfvvEIvsSbpFQp3Iz28253Ax1YSthizuQ4nVIynjMJ9AiLVAzzifWC20qsn9AdEuxDJzAy9XH-UjB1nePp2_4ZjDstitv-rHYX96fuROnLKrQC7EJSHW5Zdq0CNM4BcISpizEES9gep9OVxKc6ekjJL89EaWQXlP122J6wd-k5IbjUQw1LelOIMsSltRaftxhC1cq9FegXvrAwceBu-sEikssBtPz0heT-l5r2z3igqeNWUm-Ia8WuS3JxS-MGxtZyj84jzYLW7a8izV4UOJ2haRmg8XfZCd8LJ-yMM78S4D8mSHs1lziIhqfzOhp9ZgJQQ%3D%3D)

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of _Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc._

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=ce1ce9e616484205a28a45cfaf96cecf&_m=6baa68af6ba1406f9df20d1daba187d5&_e=6GNWp3gMvl9Lw42SHlzKfvvEIvsSbpFQp3Iz28253Ax1YSthizuQ4nVIynjMJ9AiLVAzzifWC20qsn9AdEuxDJzAy9XH-UjB1nePp2_4ZjDstitv-rHYX96fuROnLKrQC7EJSHW5Zdq0CNM4BcISpizEES9gep9OVxKc6ekjJL89EaWQXlP122J6wd-k5IbjAEdXWT0s26IRGpnNakoqR4DMQqqbKV0h7laUzJUtCfiPCLZrnBm298TQTTD1YimacJ9KCY8Hm154nTj539nBKvdp3SvbJ-ERxcZuTWKrpqLaKGoZEbgZf2fz0meAViHDq38W47zT-FplY73fxnTO7Q%3D%3D)

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: Restore our traditions of empowered citizenship
body:
What does an empowered citizen look like?

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=88a912421a884cfcac4f2781f4ec3607&_e=U4hNJknh6Oxy4PtO2kN5LcWoTh85WoPbRpdwGZy02jx0mRutkNOm7l6kFApjjck0fSn-WpUj8CtbXL7X308ft7Hbh_K7FtbBP3QqVM9r_REx_rhYxQ4TYmCuk4Kxkxx4AoMDgXRfuo4iILgtIR6oPNe2UYcqsDbTnara9z3mecyzcr6SjMhSS_Z-UY9F5gnukmkmDWix1mYTBhXQmvxu46d187zVK-WtwsQ2TR7H9sVop6blPr1gk-xLXEd2a1JWPC8aYGFKK7GDAmobTtxE8hc2c7Z1vi8q7tQYoeRI6FNOBDMbX506ZkZvKuvLqSQVNNEGzWipGEuRxYMbqGrkRJlI7qbKYgm1xpH-f_f9uuMV5lscaNQ49Xe_77_VZYuG7DzKDNWVDisaxwhf3lgEUSfpUBbtm2EmTbj7BJasrzI%3D)
---
| | Peter, I invite you to view our eight-lecture course "**[American Citizenship and Its Decline](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=88a912421a884cfcac4f2781f4ec3607&_e=U4hNJknh6Oxy4PtO2kN5LcWoTh85WoPbRpdwGZy02jx0mRutkNOm7l6kFApjjck0fSn-WpUj8CtbXL7X308ft7Hbh_K7FtbBP3QqVM9r_REx_rhYxQ4TYmCuk4Kxkxx4AoMDgXRfuo4iILgtIR6oPNe2UYcqsDbTnara9z3mecyzcr6SjMhSS_Z-UY9F5gnukmkmDWix1mYTBhXQmvxu46d187zVK-WtwsQ2TR7H9sVop6blPr1gk-xLXEd2a1JWpYBdPDxMCYaO68pIq05i3ZRJNktFPG-1vbE9voh5soB4fa99EJzCLIOrH5SMr8iv69c7CzN4RmOwfXja2C5U7epCAbgVWtkl_8_SIs7bLNtyWDdsCI_ZGQapiNLTRyhvekXUA92CoyMAyKVMd4ZF_IniSOVj7ch_n5eBQltiS_U%3D)** ," based on Victor Davis Hanson's book, _The Dying Citizen_.

Like the book, the course describes the current crises in America as symptoms of a far larger problem: the steady decline of the autonomy and political influence of the citizen.

The class describes the origins and history of citizenship in the West, reminding us that it is a rare phenomenon both in the past and the present—given the enormous responsibility placed on citizens to create and control their own government.
---
| [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=88a912421a884cfcac4f2781f4ec3607&_e=U4hNJknh6Oxy4PtO2kN5LcWoTh85WoPbRpdwGZy02jx0mRutkNOm7l6kFApjjck0fSn-WpUj8CtbXL7X308ft7Hbh_K7FtbBP3QqVM9r_REx_rhYxQ4TYmCuk4Kxkxx4AoMDgXRfuo4iILgtIR6oPNe2UYcqsDbTnara9z3mecyzcr6SjMhSS_Z-UY9F5gnukmkmDWix1mYTBhXQmvxu46d187zVK-WtwsQ2TR7H9sVop6blPr1gk-xLXEd2a1JWKoRZDSlu45T9PGE-vf850OHVI4o61c7veRMnpOL_Fhlr2mh0QZod8cWAyIDUAj87fJQYgohhhVNjLNi5xwENrG18DO4MB9jBYPA6GyE172fKtMqeQivs_MUcVOeyEVOwW-TbgnzBuU3JJORVpIVHOZG7aWISAUPhwT_sIorzmAU%3D)
---
| | Citizenship then requires a large and self-reliant middle class--currently shrinking under enormous economic strains. Clearly defined and enforced borders are also essential to ensure a civic space in which citizens can nurture common customs, sustain traditions, and honor their own shared past.

Yet borders are now increasingly fluid as mere residence and citizenship seem often indistinguishable. Pre-civilizational tribalism--identifying by superficial appearance rather than through shared culture and values--is returning to America.

These organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down stresses such as the growth of a huge, permanent, but unelected, government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the citizen.

In addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the theory that a new, changing, and fluid Constitution must match an always evolving human nature.

Globalism is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state. But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to supplant American laws and independence with international organizations and often without the consent of the legislative branch or the assent of the governed.

The course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered citizenship and reassert control over the government.

You can receive a DVD box set of "**American Citizenship and Its Decline** " with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more toward Hillsdale College's Annual Fund. You can easily give and reserve your DVD box set using this secure link:

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdalƒe/citizenship-dvd](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=88a912421a884cfcac4f2781f4ec3607&_e=U4hNJknh6Oxy4PtO2kN5LcWoTh85WoPbRpdwGZy02jx0mRutkNOm7l6kFApjjck0fSn-WpUj8CtbXL7X308ft7Hbh_K7FtbBP3QqVM9r_REx_rhYxQ4TYmCuk4Kxkxx4AoMDgXRfuo4iILgtIR6oPNe2UYcqsDbTnara9z3mecyzcr6SjMhSS_Z-UY9F5gnukmkmDWix1mYTBhXQmvxu46d187zVK-WtwsQ2TR7H9sVop6blPr1gk-xLXEd2a1JWmu78_ODlaJIEFb3u7f5Sgm-zOUpr4FfbtiNjK53gcqXBmK63j4UhFU1vYJwJ5mix9fxywJgIT5CRJ5iqJNCgyRiEAvJg8udiVL1meq67_0adwR5w6sKKGOYv3UKxMOxoY-7yiF7XJEgHHdlBaP6cLwFeoD79EsFUh-MFU3sjRaQ%3D)

Best wishes,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA
---

name: Leaders We Deserve
subject: These poll numbers should scare us all.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
It’s not just a messaging problem. It’s a Democratic Party problem.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250510-1&t=1&akid=2111%2E587540%2ER1oXVj)
Let’s talk about the numbers, Peter.
Trump is crashing the economy. He’s disappearing people. He’s burning down every institution of democracy he touches. His popularity is tanking.
And somehow... he’s _still_ polling ahead of Democrats.
🧨 45% say Trump would do a better job than Harris (43%).
🧨 40% trust Trump more than Democrats (32%) to handle the economy.
🧨 Even after everything he’s done, _he’s still winning the narrative._
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250510_1_trump_polls?refcode=em20250510-2111&:amount=5&refcode2=2111_587540_R1oXVj&akid=2111%2E587540%2ER1oXVj)
It’s a _credibility_ problem. It’s a _leadership_ problem. It’s a _Democratic Party_ problem.
And unless we fix it, we will lose – again.
That’s one big reason why we started **Leaders We Deserve**. Because we need more than a new message. We need a new generation of leaders – people who aren’t afraid to fight like hell, call out BS when they see it, and actually connect with voters who’ve stopped believing in the system.
Here’s what we’re doing about in the coming election cycle:
🔥 We’re primarying Democrats who are asleep at the wheel.
🔥 We’re backing bold progressives in swing districts.
🔥 We’re building a Democratic Party voters can trust again.
**[Peter, if you agree it’s time for serious change, chip in $5 to power the movement to rebuild this party.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250510_1_trump_polls?refcode=em20250510-2111&amount=5&refcode2=2111_587540_R1oXVj&akid=2111%2E587540%2ER1oXVj)**

We cannot afford to lose even more voters when there is so much at stake.
Thanks for being in this with us,
Leaders We Deserve

name: 15,000 signatures needed [Gillibrand HQ]
subject: The unfortunate reality:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
It’s Teacher Appreciation Week — a time to celebrate the vital work our educators do to shape all of our lives.

We all know: A good educator means everything.

**Unfortunately, Donald Trump and extremist Republicans don’t appreciate educators.** In fact, they’ve put our public education system on the chopping block — attempting to cut funding for public schools, dismantle teacher training and D.E.I. programs, and close the Department of Education.

[**_So today, we’re gathering 15,000 signatures to thank educators for their tireless work and show Trump that we will always have their backs:_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107461385/544748195/-1141003213?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2025.05.10_Thank-Teachers_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTI2MjAyMy1iZDJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JP1bU8MrlV8V54Fwcr3Z1hTg5jH0y76DT59VHYMQH1s=&emci=dda3699f-1f2d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=05262023-bd2d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=7659029) | [**_X. We should be doing everything we can to support educators — not ripping away resources that help them do their jobs.

That’s exactly what Trump is attempting to do:

body:
The Trump administration made a secret deal between the Department of Homeland Security and the IRS to share taxpayer information to target immigrants, and they’re refusing to release the full details to Congress.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107461499/544748605/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-05-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjRlNzk4ZC1iZDJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1wPhq505ynvS7mA50e0mWgPj2w4gfymskWCOnt4xxfs=)

| Hi Peter, I need you to hear this directly from me.

The Trump administration made a secret deal between the Department of Homeland Security and the IRS to **share taxpayer information to target immigrants** , and they’re refusing to release the full details to Congress.

The agreement is redacted, hidden, and shrouded in secrecy. Even legal experts say it likely violates federal privacy laws.

Let’s be clear: **immigrants contribute billions in taxes every year.** Many file using ITINs, paying into systems like Medicare and Social Security—benefits they can’t even access. And now, the government wants to use that same information to punish them?

That’s wrong. It’s un-American. And I’m fighting back.

I joined more than 40 of my colleagues to demand the full, unredacted memo. [👉 _**Will you sign my petition demanding transparency and protections for immigrant taxpayers?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107461500/544748606/-1321827440?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNjRlNzk4ZC1iZDJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1wPhq505ynvS7mA50e0mWgPj2w4gfymskWCOnt4xxfs=&emci=2b96c26a-4a2c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=e64e798d-bd2d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=6681226)

Linda
