name: Deb Haaland
subject: Turning hope into action
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Recently, I had the chance to write an op-ed for Courier Newsroom. I hope you’ll take a few moments to give it a read.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1860%2E400544%2EnelfXJ)
Since Donald Trump re-entered the White House this January, it’s been very clear that the administration’s priority is enriching their millionaire and billionaire friends while everyday families across the country pay the price.
Recently, I had the chance to write an op-ed for Courier Newsroom explaining the situation and what we’re going to do about it. I hope you’ll take a few moments to give it a read and join us as we work to create a better, more stable future for New Mexico.
— Deb
* * *
It’s About More Than Resistance,
It’s About Turning Hope Into Action
_Deb Haaland_
April 28, 2025
This month, we saw President Trump, Elon Musk, and big CEO’s turn the Oval Office into a corporate boardroom from the movie Wolf of Wall Street, all while they celebrated their massive profits for doing absolutely nothing to benefit everyday working people. President Trump even pointed at his millionaire and billionaire friends, yelling out how much money they each made on his tariff scam.
Meanwhile, in New Mexico and across the country, people who work hard every day saw their retirements take a huge hit. Families continue to struggle to make ends meet: rent soars, groceries take up more of our paychecks, and communities feel unsafe. Our country is in a tailspin while Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and their wealthy friends add to their bank accounts on the backs of everyday Americans.
It’s chaos and it’s painful – but we must stay in the fight. That’s why I’m running for governor in my home state of New Mexico.
**Our current situation, while extreme, is actually not an especially unique one. For too long, politics has been dominated by the wealthy and well-connected, leaving working families behind.** But we can change that. We don’t have to accept the status quo—we must demand better.
I’m running for governor because we need leaders who understand the struggles New Mexicans and working Americans across the nation face and seek solutions, not profits. People need to see themselves in their leaders and trust that we know what they’re up against.
I haven’t lived an easy life. I started working at a bakery when I was nearly 15, struggled with homelessness, and raised my kid as a single parent. Through it all, I felt what so many hardworking people feel every day: that the system isn’t working for us. But I’ve also felt something just as powerful—hope. That hope turned into action when I decided to get sober, and when I looked in the mirror at age 28 and decided to go to college.
This is a critical moment. The current President is waging an assault against the poor, the sick, and the hungry, but I believe leadership is about more than resisting fear and division—it’s about inspiring hope and taking action. As a public servant, I’ve seen firsthand what real leadership looks like—prioritizing people over politics and making decisions based on facts and fairness.
**When I was Secretary of the Department of the Interior under the Biden-Harris administration, my team and I led with conviction and a clear vision to make people’s lives better.** We created good jobs in clean energy and cleaned up legacy pollution. We supported our workforce of nearly 70,000 employees by respecting their expertise and honoring their service to the country.
While President Trump and his allies look for the latest scam to make money, I am focused on the solutions that will strengthen our communities. New Mexico deserves leadership that delivers results, not reckless rhetoric. That’s why we must show up in the places where too many politicians have failed to. We have to listen to the pain people are feeling, take it seriously, and then act accordingly. That means listening to farmers, ranchers, firefighters, small business owners, parents, teachers to ensure their voices shape our future.
As I traveled across New Mexico during the first month of my campaign, I met teachers, parents, veterans, federal workers, and people from all walks of life. As I chatted with a mom in a rural area of the state, she shared that she was worried about her kids’ schools and that they would get stuck later in life. **Like that mom, the people I met made this point – they want leaders who will put their heads down, do the work, and make their lives better and their kids’ futures more stable.**
My vision for New Mexico is clear: No one should have to choose between paying rent and putting food on the table. Families should feel safe in their neighborhoods. Small businesses should thrive without being buried in red tape. Young people should be able to afford homes in the state they love. And New Mexico should lead the nation in clean energy, sustainable agriculture, and economic opportunity for all. We can do this, but it will take bold leadership and a renewed sense of hope in what’s possible.
* * *
**Thank you for reading!** Deb knows that jobs, health, housing, education, and safety will help New Mexico families prosper. She’s running for governor because the fights we face today are bigger than ever, and she’s ready to tackle them head-on and make the system work for people the way it should. **But since Deb’s running a grassroots campaign, she’s counting on supporters like you to pitch in $10, $20, $50, or whatever you can to help her win.** **[Will you pitch in any amount today to help elect Deb as New Mexico’s next governor?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250510_1_op-ed?refcode=em20250510-1860&refcode2=1860_400544_nelfXJ&akid=1860%2E400544%2EnelfXJ)** **[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250510_1_op-ed?refcode=em20250510-1860&refcode2=1860_400544_nelfXJ&akid=1860%2E400544%2EnelfXJ)**
---

clean_body: Recently, I had the chance to write an op-ed for Courier Newsroom. I hope you’ll take a few moments to give it a read. Since Donald Trump re-entered the White House this January, it’s been very clear that the administration’s priority is enriching their millionaire and billionaire friends while everyday families across the country pay the price. Recently, I had the chance to write an op-ed for Courier Newsroom explaining the situation and what we’re going to do about it. I hope you’ll take a few moments to give it a read and join us as we work to create a better, more stable future for New Mexico. — Deb It’s About More Than Resistance, It’s About Turning Hope Into Action Deb Haaland April 28, 2025 This month, we saw President Trump, Elon Musk, and big CEO’s turn the Oval Office into a corporate boardroom from the movie Wolf of Wall Street, all while they celebrated their massive profits for doing absolutely nothing to benefit everyday working people. President Trump even pointed at his millionaire and billionaire friends, yelling out how much money they each made on his tariff scam. Meanwhile, in New Mexico and across the country, people who work hard every day saw their retirements take a huge hit. Families continue to struggle to make ends meet: rent soars, groceries take up more of our paychecks, and communities feel unsafe. Our country is in a tailspin while Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and their wealthy friends add to their bank accounts on the backs of everyday Americans. It’s chaos and it’s painful – but we must stay in the fight. That’s why I’m running for governor in my home state of New Mexico. Our current situation, while extreme, is actually not an especially unique one. For too long, politics has been dominated by the wealthy and well-connected, leaving working families behind. But we can change that. We don’t have to accept the status quo—we must demand better. I’m running for governor because we need leaders who understand the struggles New Mexicans and working Americans across the nation face and seek solutions, not profits. People need to see themselves in their leaders and trust that we know what they’re up against. I haven’t lived an easy life. I started working at a bakery when I was nearly 15, struggled with homelessness, and raised my kid as a single parent. Through it all, I felt what so many hardworking people feel every day: that the system isn’t working for us. But I’ve also felt something just as powerful—hope. That hope turned into action when I decided to get sober, and when I looked in the mirror at age 28 and decided to go to college. This is a critical moment. The current President is waging an assault against the poor, the sick, and the hungry, but I believe leadership is about more than resisting fear and division—it’s about inspiring hope and taking action. As a public servant, I’ve seen firsthand what real leadership looks like—prioritizing people over politics and making decisions based on facts and fairness. When I was Secretary of the Department of the Interior under the Biden-Harris administration, my team and I led with conviction and a clear vision to make people’s lives better. We created good jobs in clean energy and cleaned up legacy pollution. We supported our workforce of nearly 70,000 employees by respecting their expertise and honoring their service to the country. While President Trump and his allies look for the latest scam to make money, I am focused on the solutions that will strengthen our communities. New Mexico deserves leadership that delivers results, not reckless rhetoric. That’s why we must show up in the places where too many politicians have failed to. We have to listen to the pain people are feeling, take it seriously, and then act accordingly. That means listening to farmers, ranchers, firefighters, small business owners, parents, teachers to ensure their voices shape our future. As I traveled across New Mexico during the first month of my campaign, I met teachers, parents, veterans, federal workers, and people from all walks of life. As I chatted with a mom in a rural area of the state, she shared that she was worried about her kids’ schools and that they would get stuck later in life. Like that mom, the people I met made this point – they want leaders who will put their heads down, do the work, and make their lives better and their kids’ futures more stable. My vision for New Mexico is clear: No one should have to choose between paying rent and putting food on the table. Families should feel safe in their neighborhoods. Small businesses should thrive without being buried in red tape. Young people should be able to afford homes in the state they love. And New Mexico should lead the nation in clean energy, sustainable agriculture, and economic opportunity for all. We can do this, but it will take bold leadership and a renewed sense of hope in what’s possible. Thank you for reading! Deb knows that jobs, health, housing, education, and safety will help New Mexico families prosper. She’s running for governor because the fights we face today are bigger than ever, and she’s ready to tackle them head-on and make the system work for people the way it should. But since Deb’s running a grassroots campaign, she’s counting on supporters like you to pitch in $10, $20, $50, or whatever you can to help her win.

name: Jane Fonda
subject: A little story about how fitness funded a movement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
It all started with a pair of leg warmers...

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107462005/544749729/1328794144?refcode=ea.57156fcf-be2d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.57156fcf-be2d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU3MTU2ZmNmLWJlMmQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fsAwuT0vVf6l1K1VTScM69o4uFou-BuVNq1cb63-zDk=&emci=9cf1a0f6-ec2c-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=57156fcf-be2d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4823105)
---
You probably know me as an actor, an activist, and yes, the woman in leg warmers from those workout tapes. But there’s a deeper story behind all that sweat. And it’s one I carry with me every day. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107462006/544749730/481203468?refcode=ea.57156fcf-be2d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.57156fcf-be2d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU3MTU2ZmNmLWJlMmQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fsAwuT0vVf6l1K1VTScM69o4uFou-BuVNq1cb63-zDk=) Back in the late ’70s, my then-husband, Tom Hayden, and I had founded the California Campaign for Economic Democracy — an effort to organize around housing, workers’ rights, environmental justice, and so much more. We were determined to make a real difference, but we needed a way to raise money that wasn’t dependent on big donors or corporate interests. I realized the only other business I really understood besides acting was exercise. So I took that knowledge — along with a whole lot of conviction — and launched the **Jane Fonda Workout.** I had no idea it would sell millions of copies. I definitely didn’t expect it to become the top-selling VHS tape in the country. But it did. And every penny of profit went straight into the movement. Those tapes helped fund the fight against toxic chemical dumps in California. They helped push for protective environmental policies and to support liberal candidates who were ready to take on the big issues. And now, more than 40 years later, that legacy continues, just in a different form. **This month, we’re celebrating the 43rd anniversary of my very first workout tape. To mark the occasion, I’ve signed a handful of memorabilia from those early days — VHS tapes, a vinyl, and a few surprises from my vault — and we’re giving supporters like you the chance to take one home.** **[If you make a donation of any amount by May 15th, you’ll be automatically entered into the giveaway. We’ll take care of the shipping — you help us power the movement.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107462007/544749731/481203468?refcode=ea.57156fcf-be2d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.57156fcf-be2d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU3MTU2ZmNmLWJlMmQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fsAwuT0vVf6l1K1VTScM69o4uFou-BuVNq1cb63-zDk=)** | [**ENTER THE GIVEAWAY →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107462008/544749732/481203468?refcode=ea.57156fcf-be2d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ms=ea.57156fcf-be2d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU3MTU2ZmNmLWJlMmQtZjAxMS04YjNkLTYwNDViZGVkOGNjYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fsAwuT0vVf6l1K1VTScM69o4uFou-BuVNq1cb63-zDk=)
---
Just like those tapes helped fund our movement back then, this memorabilia will help fund JanePAC’s work to elect climate champions who refuse fossil fuel money and are ready to take bold, urgent action to protect our environment and our future.
With love and determination,

clean_body: It all started with a pair of leg warmers... | You probably know me as an actor, an activist, and yes, the woman in leg warmers from those workout tapes. But there’s a deeper story behind all that sweat. And it’s one I carry with me every day. = Back in the late ’70s, my then-husband, Tom Hayden, and I had founded the California Campaign for Economic Democracy — an effort to organize around housing, workers’ rights, environmental justice, and so much more. We were determined to make a real difference, but we needed a way to raise money that wasn’t dependent on big donors or corporate interests. I realized the only other business I really understood besides acting was exercise. So I took that knowledge — along with a whole lot of conviction — and launched the Jane Fonda Workout. I had no idea it would sell millions of copies. I definitely didn’t expect it to become the top-selling VHS tape in the country. But it did. And every penny of profit went straight into the movement. Those tapes helped fund the fight against toxic chemical dumps in California. They helped push for protective environmental policies and to support liberal candidates who were ready to take on the big issues. And now, more than 40 years later, that legacy continues, just in a different form. This month, we’re celebrating the 43rd anniversary of my very first workout tape. To mark the occasion, I’ve signed a handful of memorabilia from those early days — VHS tapes, a vinyl, and a few surprises from my vault — and we’re giving supporters like you the chance to take one home. = | = Just like those tapes helped fund our movement back then, this memorabilia will help fund JanePAC’s work to elect climate champions who refuse fossil fuel money and are ready to take bold, urgent action to protect our environment and our future. With love and determination, Xx Jane = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

I’ll admit it, Peter:

I never thought that I would be in this position.

I’m not a career politician. I didn’t think running for Congress was in the cards, but when I saw our communities being taken backwards by a rubber-stamp for the MAGA agenda, I knew I had to step up.

From day one on the trail, I made listening to the working families I would ultimately serve my top priority. I vowed that if I was elected to the House, it’d be for the people of this district – not special interests or party leadership.

Together, we shocked the GOP establishment by flipping this seat. In fact, I ended up being one of the only Democrats in the country to flip a Republican-held seat in what turned out to be a tough election.

**Now, I’m facing my first-ever re-election. As a first-time Congressman in a Republican-controlled House, I’m in a particularly vulnerable spot.**

Early support helped us build an incredible coalition in the last election cycle. I need your help to do it again:

**[I’m working hard to deliver results in Congress, so I can’t spend as much time raising the funds we need to hold this seat. Will you chip in $3 to keep me fighting for you in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107462934/544753004/1606932672?refcode=em-5.10.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTFlNDU5ZC1jMDJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zGRZcl4hYRJlC1ityUX1qRv0s-wEswdli7PSsdvWUHc=)**

clean_body: | = = I’ll admit it, Peter: I never thought that I would be in this position. I’m not a career politician. I didn’t think running for Congress was in the cards, but when I saw our communities being taken backwards by a rubber-stamp for the MAGA agenda, I knew I had to step up. From day one on the trail, I made listening to the working families I would ultimately serve my top priority. I vowed that if I was elected to the House, it’d be for the people of this district – not special interests or party leadership. Together, we shocked the GOP establishment by flipping this seat. In fact, I ended up being one of the only Democrats in the country to flip a Republican-held seat in what turned out to be a tough election. Now, I’m facing my first-ever re-election. As a first-time Congressman in a Republican-controlled House, I’m in a particularly vulnerable spot. Early support helped us build an incredible coalition in the last election cycle. I need your help to do it again: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, GW | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Now, he’s ready to deliver for the people of California's 27th Congressional District. = To learn more about George and his commitment to working families, please visit: = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . name: The Squad
subject: No corporate cash 🚫
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250510-1347-foote&t=1001&akid=1347%2E342411%2EhHnOjP ]Squad Victory Fund

Hey Peter, it’s the
Squad 👋🏽

You probably know that our campaigns don’t take a cent from the corporate
PACs or the right-wing billionaires trying to run our country.

Here’s why:

Special interests have had their way in Washington for far too long. They
cut huge checks, politicians cater to their agenda, and working people get
left behind.

We’re charting a new way forward. One that’s committed to putting everyday
Americans first – the parents, nurses, waitresses, teachers and everyone
struggling to make ends meet in this rigged economy.

We reject donations from massive corporations because we put the people
first.

Our movement is powered by thousands of folks across the country who are
coming together to fight for a better world – and we won’t let corporate
interests get in our way.

But that also means we count on grassroots supporters to power our work.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250510-movement.TUkQfR&refcode=em20250510-1347&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1347%2E342411%2EhHnOjP ]Can you donate any amount that makes sense for you to help us stay in
Congress and fight big money head on?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250510-movement.TUkQfR&refcode=em20250510-1347&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1347%2E342411%2EhHnOjP ]Contribute ››

Thank you 💜

– The Squad

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1347%2E342411%2EhHnOjP

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

Today I want to take a moment to celebrate someone truly special — my wife, Monica. Mother’s Day is about honoring the strength, love, and compassion that mothers bring into our lives. And Monica embodies all of that and more. She’s been my rock, an incredible partner, and most importantly, an extraordinary mother to our daughters. [This Mother’s Day, I’m asking you to help me wish Monica a Happy Mother’s Day. Will you add your name to a card just for her?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107463117/544753739/-1640882335?source=SBD_RR_EM_EN_051025_MOTHERSDAY_30DO30DNTL_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmZlYTdiZTgtYzAyZC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wjW1iH7Lz-k-dvRus6nQ_719x3lKQcrO4jFtUDKpvmY=&emci=c1ae0e23-0d2d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=2fea7be8-c02d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4131986) | | **[SIGN THE CARD](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107463131/544753758/-1640882335?source=SBD_RR_EM_EN_051025_MOTHERSDAY_30DO30DNTL_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDcvMS8xMDc4NzAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmZlYTdiZTgtYzAyZC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=wjW1iH7Lz-k-dvRus6nQ_719x3lKQcrO4jFtUDKpvmY=&emci=c1ae0e23-0d2d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=2fea7be8-c02d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=4131986)**

Raul

The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. **Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.**

clean_body: While Washington remains gridlocked, Dr. Raul Ruiz is committed to serving and helping constituents with the problems they have with the federal government and cutting red tape. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | It's Raul. Today I want to take a moment to celebrate someone truly special — my wife, Monica. Mother’s Day is about honoring the strength, love, and compassion that mothers bring into our lives. And Monica embodies all of that and more. She’s been my rock, an incredible partner, and most importantly, an extraordinary mother to our daughters. | | Let’s show Monica how loved and appreciated she is — today and every day. And to all the incredible mothers of CA-25, Happy Mother’s Day! We’re incredibly grateful for you. With gratitude, Raul | | | ---|---|--- = The son of hardworking farmworkers, Dr. Ruiz grew up in Coachella, CA and learned at an early age that the key to attaining the American Dream is hard work and a great education. In the summer of 1990, Raul walked in the desert heat from business to business in the Coachella Valley asking them to invest in their community by contributing to his education. With each investment for college, he made a promise to come back home and serve his community as a physician. In 2012, he decided to take his service to the community to the next level by running for Congress. Dr. Ruiz needs our help to continue fighting for us in Congress.** | = = PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =. Dr. Raul Ruiz for Congress Committee P.O. Box 1566 Indio, CA 92202 United States

An even larger portion of supporters won’t click on it. And most of our grassroots team won’t chip in $3 to elect state Democrats today. State legislative majorities are won or lost by narrow margins. Five chambers on our target map were decided by a single seat last cycle, directly impacting the lives of 40 million Americans. Our majority in the VA House was won with just 975 votes in 2023. When we tell you that $3 can make or break a Democratic victory, we mean it. Peter, Yesterday, we sounded the alarm about a threat that should concern every American: the coordinated MAGA campaign to take over our state courts -- and silence the judges who protect our rights. If you were one of the many donors who stepped up -- **thank you**. Your support means everything. Hours after we sent that message, we received chilling confirmation of what's at stake: the Trump administration **announced it is considering suspending habeas corpus** -- the constitutional right that protects people from being imprisoned without cause.
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-z2AVmXa94t5hzs-2BfLlEouNX1c6ULg-1d9ngQ3yhbSzmta04SkvprxIibqA2ZnI8DkNXITRz6QMlssnGYMj8D74pE9tROvBLM-6SWaXUyaC5kDanQ__I2vTEECwtky-xs2KebAXb-rO3M_g890qaZG260ls4ka_arE2B7CV-KBXPnL2ZSt-k49Vh2708WnEtQmrykDWPwvI6MguhEndTsCA8jUj23vP_PUtreYYNH3Hy5okEeQxyXiNwsy0tImssfB-mmpYr9JEqBn4TKck8AFto7Lf_d-J7xMQINPR0hXLS8G6prT-2OJ6IkJF4b6SoHnmC5pdiliSAXT_AhaClYYil4EHtca6iXStmlUvJW1/4gd/VMxQqC8fRp-6HZHF5fDENA/h1/h001.tcqlKzHN4u0mvto70couRpz7O3SMfWT102fI46uWhmo)
---
Yes, you read that right. Just after a federal judge in Vermont ordered the release of a Tufts University student from ICE custody **based on that very principle** , Trump's chief policy advisor Stephen Miller told reporters that they're now weighing the suspension of **this core pillar of American freedom.** Let's be crystal clear: **suspending habeas corpus is authoritarianism** -- plain and simple. We cannot let this happen. That's why we're fighting to keep strong, independent judges on the bench -- starting with the **three Democratic Pennsylvania Supreme Court Justices** under attack in this year's retention election. These judges have upheld the Constitution, blocked voter suppression, and stood firm against MAGA extremism. Now, they need us. [**Can you rush a donation right now to help us raise $100,000 to defend our courts and stop Trump's takeover of the judiciary?**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-z2AVmXa94t5hzs-2BfLlEqZxiLyzz1eEEvSuhh8iZ6j2ot-Zvc-d_9jlCUCzqxhJMNT9BMFwQXNFenNFFFEb4GPBpsJSKkfCli5MLXiDmlQdxAmxj5hvgrKjYB062rIgvNxLtUhgl1basQ6vQKdClLeq4_pyAg03kVSR6BkVAiCX73m9N6RG4p1KM1B05zn6-fpliWMBJIJUIJivnFvz3bPL3vGVdGLyhXBrzupuopTx8jFRu4r52ar1-Qr2bF4xyH86UMFdXEgAvEVqclbRoQyiK0dCaBFUtXe3Fc3OfQuzqIpJZpKqN5twUKyTEbAIFNk8PwzYRS-ApaDBJKgHkgiFxDOeuQPZAWAmcVRHlHI/4gd/VMxQqC8fRp-6HZHF5fDENA/h2/h001.l0ooakroYcL-X0CYzS3PuAUWH7FRuZ9Ygw5y_mtrK5k)[](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv1STuy_axapI11rAiEMjCBP8MqJU5OU8RUGh4w-siT-_ijzZErikcyH_e_PmR4Q9NWd6aSxFbPW9a9_0XTQrMXk_z6lRpe109fsw7kIrALXly_6gPsdFOcxqnv3ccwfxB-PgIcDUYwJoDLuYqnF5TrR0FszBrevsuThnjHqTGTDfJh6fiJnzciz-_EFPutYFI_lLfxb5NldPhjN8jA1oB-I4tLNUkvCsCN6fF_RxWeBV3GuaQaSYM5NlqDecYpENrW1qrwTQd5VDm9RsRwm42qNqMBeD0ly0VWh2LFLoPSmb0K6-U7wI7OUpDEGbQyMGs-01cRnz0VIxT90jaLYBFF079rJh9UtnfPCpgug-eJq-QkMuWs9WjovwtQVd7O_1vTqUpIXq_vCl_PnlDNdrzw/4gd/VMxQqC8fRp-6HZHF5fDENA/h3/h001.8EKLDAQ4Age_FBB1Qv7a2Ouy85fkCVr7YpJV1b8-h_M)

clean_body: The Trump administration announced it is considering suspending habeas corpus — the constitutional right that protects people from being imprisoned without cause. | | Peter, Yesterday, we sounded the alarm about a threat that should concern every American: the coordinated MAGA campaign to take over our state courts -- and silence the judges who protect our rights. If you were one of the many donors who stepped up -- thank you. Your support means everything. Hours after we sent that message, we received chilling confirmation of what's at stake: the Trump administration announced it is considering suspending habeas corpus -- the constitutional right that protects people from being imprisoned without cause. | Yes, you read that right. Just after a federal judge in Vermont ordered the release of a Tufts University student from ICE custody based on that very principle , Trump's chief policy advisor Stephen Miller told reporters that they're now weighing the suspension of this core pillar of American freedom. Let's be crystal clear: suspending habeas corpus is authoritarianism -- plain and simple. We cannot let this happen. That's why we're fighting to keep strong, independent judges on the bench -- starting with the three Democratic Pennsylvania Supreme Court Justices under attack in this year's retention election. These judges have upheld the Constitution, blocked voter suppression, and stood firm against MAGA extremism. Now, they need us. With our very democracy on the line, The Defend Our Courts Team P.S. Haven 't seen yesterday's message yet? The Democrats pulled out ALL THE STOPS to try to defeat me and other Republicans this election and THEY FAILED! But they won’t be giving up any time soon.

| | | It's Young. I'm personally reaching out to you today to ask for a quick favor.

The Democrats pulled out ALL THE STOPS to try to defeat me and other Republicans this past election and THEY FAILED!

But they won't be giving up any time soon.

They were caught off guard when Republicans won in critical elections, and we were able to KEEP the House RED. Now, they are out for revenge and want nothing more than to see the end of our conservative movement.

They have been fundraising nonstop since the election and are prepared to do ANY and EVERYTHING in their power to make sure our House Majority falls short of our goal to get America back on track.

We are rapidly approaching our major fundraising goal and if we fail to reach it, their wish could become a reality.

These fundraising goals may seem arbitrary, but let me assure you they are not. Reaching each one of these goals is critical:
_**To DEFEND our House Majority.

To STAND AGAINST the far-Left agenda.

To PRESERVE our conservative values AND the American Dream.**_

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T00a0c01b-c243-4e5f-94e8-a6b8fc3811f5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
| Sign on to become a recurring donor now.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=4710%2E35263%2E3GjGU0)
Peter — First, we want to thank you for supporting Tammy’s work for Wisconsin in the Senate. In the first 100+ days of Trump’s presidency, Tammy has met every challenge with grit and determination. She’s called out Trump’s many broken promises and stood up for the Wisconsin farmers and families who have paid the price. She’s met with those affected by this administration’s chaotic actions — including veterans, VA employees, dairy farmers, and more — to understand the full scope of Trump’s harm. And she’ll continue to fight back against this administration to defend our shared priorities in the Senate every single day. **You’ve been by our side through it all, Peter.** By opening emails like the one you’re reading right now, signing our petitions, and even chipping in a few bucks when you can, you’ve become an integral part of everything we do. **[Now, we want to ask you to make an even larger impact with a monthly, recurring contribution.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3587?c0=stb-em-may25.BWrehl&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250510_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4710%2E35263%2E3GjGU0)** | [BECOME A MONTHLY DONOR](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4527?c0=stb-em-may25.FZdoDC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250510_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=4710%2E35263%2E3GjGU0)
---
Making a sustained, recurring contribution allows us to plan more effectively because we’ll know how many resources we can count on month over month. We can make smarter spending decisions and sustain our operations over the long term.
Early investment builds on our ability to adapt to changing circumstances and respond to unexpected events. We can adjust our strategies in real time AND fight back against attacks faster.
The best part? It doesn’t have to be a huge monthly commitment. Tammy’s work to deliver for Wisconsinites and flip the Senate blue in 2026 is powered by grassroots donors like you chipping in $5 or $10 at a time.
**[Peter, will you commit to a monthly contribution of any amount today? This is the best way to support Tammy’s work defending our rights and freedoms from the Trump administration.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3587?c0=stb-em-may25.BWrehl&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250510_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=4710%2E35263%2E3GjGU0)**

We can make smarter spending decisions and sustain our operations over the long term. Early investment builds on our ability to adapt to changing circumstances and respond to unexpected events. We can adjust our strategies in real time AND fight back against attacks faster. The best part? It doesn’t have to be a huge monthly commitment. Tammy’s work to deliver for Wisconsinites and flip the Senate blue in 2026 is powered by grassroots donors like you chipping in $5 or $10 at a time. Thank you so much for your continued support, Baldwin HQ P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701 | mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM | PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE If you would like to receive fewer emails, update your subscription preferences If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please

subject: Our path to taking back the Senate majority

body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8555%2E5257348%2ErKXdTN ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek — I’m
honored to serve as Vice-Chair of the DSCC (the Senate Democrats’ campaign
arm), where I’m tasked with helping Democrats fighting to flip the Senate
blue.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250510_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=8555%2E5257348%2ErKXdTN ]In just a moment, I’m going to lay out the stakes of the upcoming
elections and make sure we’re all on the same page about what we need to
do to win in 2026. Before I do, will you chip in to help make it happen?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=q22025_abs_em.PyXMxO&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250510_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8555%2E5257348%2ErKXdTN ]CHIP IN

Senate Republicans have bent the knee to Trump on everything — confirming
his dangerously unqualified nominees, giving Elon Musk free rein to raid
the federal government, allowing Trump to attack critical programs like
Social Security and Medicare, and so much more.

We know that Donald Trump doesn’t care one bit about adhering to the rule
of law and doing what’s right for the American people, which means that we
need a Senate majority that will stand up to him.

That’s where we come in,
Derek. In 2026, 33 Senate seats
will be on the ballot. We don’t need to win all 33 seats to win the
majority, but we do need to defend all our Democratic-held seats and flip
four GOP-held seats.

We need to protect Democratic incumbents in these states:

* Jon Ossoff in Georgia
* John Hickenlooper in Colorado
* Mark Warner in Virginia
* Cory Booker in New Jersey

And we also have a few incumbent Democratic Senators retiring, which means
we’ll need to make sure the open races remain blue in these states:

* Michigan
* Minnesota
* New Hampshire
* Illinois

On top of that tall task, we have to flip four more seats. We know that
Republicans are going to spend BIG in every single one of these states to
defend and expand their Republican majority, so we need to prepare to
fight back.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250510_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=8555%2E5257348%2ErKXdTN ]Your contribution will help me support our Democratic Senate candidates
running in tough races and ensure we have what it takes to flip more seats
blue in 2026. Will you pitch in a donation today to help us and stand up
against Donald Trump’s reckless agenda?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

Adam

On January 20, 2025 Donald Trump solemnly swore that he would faithfully execute the Office of President of the United States, and would to the best of his ability, preserve, protect and defend the Constitution of the United States" (interestingly his hand never touched the Bible).
**If a president’s answer to “do you need to uphold the Constitution” isn’t _yes_ , HE NEEDS TO BE IMPEACHED IMMEDIATELY. **
Since taking office, he has:
* Illegally impounded funds appropriated by Congress
* Illegally fired civil servants, independent commissioners, and dismantled agencies
* Torn up the right to due process with illegal deportations
* Enriched himself with cryptocurrency corruption

_**He is now in direct violation of his oath of office to withhold the Constitution - and we're running Impeach Trump NOW billboards in cities across the nation:

clean_body: | | | This is literally why we have the Impeachment Clause. On January 20, 2025 Donald Trump solemnly swore that he would faithfully execute the Office of President of the United States, and would to the best of his ability, preserve, protect and defend the Constitution of the United States" (interestingly his hand never touched the Bible). If a president’s answer to “do you need to uphold the Constitution” isn’t yes , HE NEEDS TO BE IMPEACHED IMMEDIATELY. Since taking office, he has: Illegally impounded funds appropriated by Congress Illegally fired civil servants, independent commissioners, and dismantled agencies Torn up the right to due process with illegal deportations Enriched himself with cryptocurrency corruption He is now in direct violation of his oath of office to withhold the Constitution - and we're running Impeach Trump NOW billboards in cities across the nation: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Can you imagine any of our past presidents saying they don’t know if they need to uphold the Constitution? His literal job is to uphold the Constitution, and he swore to it TWICE! At the same time he suggested re-opening Alcatraz, convicted felon and conman Donald Trump isn’t sure he should uphold our founding document. What kind of president won’t uphold our Constitution? A soon-to-be IMPEACHED one! ** Presidents MUST uphold the Constitution! -Cedar Key Progress | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. name: Steve Daines
subject: I’ll be very direct
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
Senate Democrats are waging an unprecedented deception campaign to block President Trump’s nominees and defy the will of the voters. |
---
Peter,

I’m going to cut out the B.S. and get right to the point.

**> >** Do you want to see Democrats outraise Republicans, giving them a free pass to buy the 2026 election?
**> >** Do you want to see Democrats pass Articles of Impeachment ending Trump’s Presidency?

subject: Trump gets a zero from me
body:
His first 100 days have seen chaos and failure.

| |
---
Team, In a recent article published in the New Jersey Globe, I spoke frankly about the first 100 days of the Trump administration. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107465761/544763663/-200729754?refcode=250510_np_zero_img&ms=250510_np_zero&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzQ0ODgxZjgtYzkyZC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IZsVUkAvqiAHBKU7VbOgNJ5b71njfylB5veOapzcMEU=)**Look, I'm not going to hold back either when it comes to speaking out about this administration and their actions, which have made life more difficult for my constituents.** The first 100 days have been made up of nothing but chaos and executive overreach. From giving Elon Musk unchecked power to run around and gut important government agencies to starting unreasoned trade wars that have sent many Americans' retirement accounts into the red. And still, there has been nothing about lowering prices for American families. Trump's leadership is failing. As you know, he won in my district, NJ-09, and I only won with a narrow margin. Because of this, Republicans think they have a good shot at flipping this seat and expanding their House majority. They are right that it will be close, but they will not prevail. _**I'll continue speaking up and speaking out — but because of how close our race will be, I also need your help. **_ **[Please, whatever you're able to chip in will go directly toward helping me hire staff, reach voters, and defend from the relentless attacks Mike Johnson and the Republicans have been making on me.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107465762/544763665/-200729754?refcode=250510_np_zero_l1&ms=250510_np_zero&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzQ0ODgxZjgtYzkyZC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IZsVUkAvqiAHBKU7VbOgNJ5b71njfylB5veOapzcMEU=)** | [Give $25 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107465770/544763673/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=250510_np_zero&ms=250510_np_zero&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzQ0ODgxZjgtYzkyZC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IZsVUkAvqiAHBKU7VbOgNJ5b71njfylB5veOapzcMEU=) | [Give $50 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107465772/544763674/-3691057?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=250510_np_zero&ms=250510_np_zero&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzQ0ODgxZjgtYzkyZC1mMDExLThiM2QtNjA0NWJkZWQ4Y2NhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IZsVUkAvqiAHBKU7VbOgNJ5b71njfylB5veOapzcMEU=)

clean_body: His first 100 days have seen chaos and failure. | | Team, In a recent article published in the New Jersey Globe, I spoke frankly about the first 100 days of the Trump administration. , I'm not going to hold back either when it comes to speaking out about this administration and their actions, which have made life more difficult for my constituents. The first 100 days have been made up of nothing but chaos and executive overreach. From giving Elon Musk unchecked power to run around and gut important government agencies to starting unreasoned trade wars that have sent many Americans' retirement accounts into the red. And still, there has been nothing about lowering prices for American families. Trump's leadership is failing. As you know, he won in my district, NJ-09, and I only won with a narrow margin. Because of this, Republicans think they have a good shot at flipping this seat and expanding their House majority. They are right that it will be close, but they will not prevail. I'll continue speaking up and speaking out — but because of how close our race will be, I also need your help. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thank you for everything. Congresswoman Nellie Pou, NJ-09 | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Nellie Pou for Congress PO Box 2696 Paterson, NJ 07509 United States

name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: Discover how economics impacts our lives
body:
Learn economics with Art Laffer

_**A message from our sponsor...**_

| | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=28cc4e59f49e4d23b8a2aaee505adabd&_e=u8j_MNnMLnPpcENecm39Z7en9aBlbn8hcHtsCACVZbeLfIq2ciLZNB6XM8L9ZdWhCd2_SDMH_VxFb9a2NTYbndag3PlUL9DfkuSNpe85bXH1oW7BeizdD57wsM8dX0FQeIHAlaB5wyR1JE-uC1Czf4fyzq9GrUVo-nXYpiatPI2utSEZQR7scacE61OS4TW8nKc2rgBGHpZlcRMdgu3dQF9LtJyAR9UJgj77jutXPWSLIQ9UIvg5ZD_mGWdaj-ddGdrMBET2dAja4kybFJvrUfjrMuM7Et8BvXmVuFF8i87juwLJj-GfTsH-FTVDkkn7gxk09bpefpIC5zSiMeyhWy5vlaMgSRQyd4qjrffGH89Zd0wr-Q62qQIJqX3nzfwxy29PRLi-cG3r9G3bAPa2axj3VrJ8jAWs7wzt4F6B_6VgMIgyQHqY3NxZdii0jqm9)
---
| | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=28cc4e59f49e4d23b8a2aaee505adabd&_e=u8j_MNnMLnPpcENecm39Z7en9aBlbn8hcHtsCACVZbeLfIq2ciLZNB6XM8L9ZdWhCd2_SDMH_VxFb9a2NTYbndag3PlUL9DfkuSNpe85bXH1oW7BeizdD57wsM8dX0FQeIHAlaB5wyR1JE-uC1Czf4fyzq9GrUVo-nXYpiatPI2utSEZQR7scacE61OS4TW8nKc2rgBGHpZlcRMdgu3dQF9LtJyAR9UJgj77jutXPWSLIQ9UIvg5ZD_mGWdaj-ddGdrMBET2dAja4kybFJvrUfjrMuM7Et8BvXmVuFF8i86aaqQ2gKZV3qB6-FxqI6MMqVFcoPGPb-QClv6x6xcMcpgA97B8eF8HqqF6LHFuzjKqVaWASEwyoTw3C413Q9RCuiLdT0yFGY6eEyY32m29OQbzSVRTzneDrzCk5eU17p9FTA5J7J18Cvee8uMEVdT_) Dear Fellow American,

I am excited to announce that Hillsdale's online teaching series, ["Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer,"](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=28cc4e59f49e4d23b8a2aaee505adabd&_e=u8j_MNnMLnPpcENecm39Z7en9aBlbn8hcHtsCACVZbeLfIq2ciLZNB6XM8L9ZdWhCd2_SDMH_VxFb9a2NTYbndag3PlUL9DfkuSNpe85bXH1oW7BeizdD57wsM8dX0FQeIHAlaB5wyR1JE-uC1Czf4fyzq9GrUVo-nXYpiatPI2utSEZQR7scacE61OS4TW8nKc2rgBGHpZlcRMdgu3dQF9LtJyAR9UJgj77jutXPWSLIQ9UIvg5ZD_mGWdaj-ddGdrMBET2dAja4kybFJvrUfjrMuM7Et8BvXmVuFF8i84azr6qJPMz7YOoNqRhtqVnSZTh76TBDaRz-Rb7XzvmX8N6oSjl6zWvvGHVMnUWwyPCt6QLTFas6OYRmmTLla0MwYeXJ2-aoUka-FzM2Q7CSUnDfL4F_iNjN-cxSsstUfs6X3I_0bSVaLXXaqgL9HRU) is now available to own as a DVD box set.

In this series, you will discover how taxation, regulation, money, government spending, and trade influence our decisions and impact our lives. Joined by Steve Forbes, Stephen Moore, Larry Kudlow, Amity Shlaes, Brian Domitrovic, and Larry P. Arnn, Dr. Laffer explains how supply-side economics holds the key to unleashing American prosperity once again.

But we need the support of citizens like you to promote this series to millions of Americans along with our other nationwide outreach.

Will you partner with us to promote this free online teaching series from Hillsdale College and expand other educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty? Your tax-deductible donation will help us to enroll thousands of Americans in this series.

And for a donation of $100 or more, we will send you this beautiful DVD box set of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer."

**To help support this course and get your copy of "Supply-Side Economics and American Prosperity with Arthur Laffer" on DVD, click the link below:**

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/supply-side-economics-support-dvd](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=28cc4e59f49e4d23b8a2aaee505adabd&_e=u8j_MNnMLnPpcENecm39Z7en9aBlbn8hcHtsCACVZbeLfIq2ciLZNB6XM8L9ZdWhCd2_SDMH_VxFb9a2NTYbndag3PlUL9DfkuSNpe85bXH1oW7BeizdD57wsM8dX0FQeIHAlaB5wyR1JE-uC1Czf4fyzq9GrUVo-nXYpiatPI2utSEZQR7scacE61OS4TW8nKc2rgBGHpZlcRMdgu3dQF9LtJyAR9UJgj77jutXPWSLIQ9UIvg5ZD_mGWdaj-ddGdrMBET2dAja4kybFJvrUfjrMuM7Et8BvXmVuFF8i84FNJ8vpUVWUzzL7rq5PS9Zc2E_addQeTPGF0zKkPb7IfYhi26FqlzAsj2_3JLJzCF-Sol_Cv1eGzv37k3EVBDuv42sevE1cXI1oj93fjW4CNr3-sRfmrNNOGl-CUusyG6S_rJDzQkVwY1qhudnJSeX)

I hope you enjoy this teaching series. Thank you for your support.

Warm Regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| Hillsdale College 33 East College Street Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA
---

| | Dear Fellow Conservative, **[I need you to take AMAC Action’s PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM right now.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=47f6f772873e4b07886a0964f4036e35&_e=Ia0ns993UWV0b1nLGeliBQN__omRIq09Z0mj-wQ_ehMbm4BJYcbtINHTTyjMgKMg9PWOb78qJW4S6FYmADPkot-c0knqfQk5pUD8atMinWSc1O4V3C4Wjqz_fod8vj1bcJT08kItLJYrj9QAonppqfKbWFXSOTLZDASQ50QC3yltW5qogzww2EkjZYxPgRhnR5vAavGESmN3hXBfoVlQDk1vp8rNKJMLATqyFsbkPzxO0Mvut0mIpUjRUWTvK6xWcw1ZSkK42IWK-JpmdOFRpnvbjKfMBWq-gv-DvPxytVKAGDi2Xpyg0x7f0vLY62iLciNoq6rkQuqFI4NzPpTKCItd_p_VDpKbEoYJHHO5WW4%3D)** Because “pro-trans” organizations are pushing the **false narrative** that the majority of Americans **_are backing the radical transgender movement and_** **_want to block President Trump’s executive orders._** This is more than a political fight—this is a battle for parental rights. The Left wants to take parents out of the equation and hand over life-altering decisions to schools, judges, and radical activists.**But AMAC Action believes parents—not woke ideologues—should have the final say in what’s best for their children.** This battle has never been more important, because a poll from one of these “pro-trans” organizations claims they’ve found **_“High Support Among Parents for Transgender, Nonbinary Children”..._**
---
_“Most adults would be willing to take all actions tested to support their child if they came out as transgender or nonbinary, including: encouraging other family members or friends to respect their gender identity (71%); use their chosen name and pronouns correctly (69%); and not vote for political candidates that support anti-transgender policies (65%)”_
---
Worse, here are some of the supposed “findings” from these radical pro-trans organizations:
---
* “38,600 transgender youth live in states that have “banned access” to facilities, such as bathrooms”.
* “120,200 transgender youth live in states that restrict access to school athletics.”
* 38% of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care.

---
As a senior how do you feel about their findings? _Are you concerned about “38,600 transgender youth being banned from locker-rooms”?__**_Or_**_**...****Are you more concerned about the hundreds of thousands of “transgender” adults _WHO ARE_ right now free to use the restroom with REAL women and girls?** _Are you worried about the 120,200 “transgender youth” living in states that “restrict access to school athletics?”_** __Or_ ..._****Are you scared that your daughters or granddaughters might be forced to compete with,_and be injured by,_ a biological male?** _Are you worried that_ 38% _of transgender adolescents live in states with laws or policies restricting their access to gender-affirming care?_**__Or_ ..._****** **Are you horrified that children are undergoing surgeries that leave them unable to have children of their own, and make them dependent on powerful, lifelong pharmaceutical treatments, sometimes without parental consent or knowledge?****I know what side I stand on. I stand on the side of parental rights and the protection of our children.** **And that’s why I need your immediate response:[Take your AMAC Action PARENTS vs. PROPAGANDA: SURVEY ON TRANS RADICALISM _right now_ to stand with conservative seniors who want to protect America’s children _._](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=47f6f772873e4b07886a0964f4036e35&_e=Ia0ns993UWV0b1nLGeliBQN__omRIq09Z0mj-wQ_ehMbm4BJYcbtINHTTyjMgKMg9PWOb78qJW4S6FYmADPkot-c0knqfQk5pUD8atMinWSc1O4V3C4Wjqz_fod8vj1bcJT08kItLJYrj9QAonppqfKbWFXSOTLZDASQ50QC3yltW5qogzww2EkjZYxPgRhnTzn1WhBxsc2yskx2ZWkTp2wQmzxmVVTb86UjcWxJB6sj5Ir3XtAke-IljXH7uZWtX_P78q-XTrd3Gpu9CUlf3BarHDXgHuwS7FhxX-yJR7pMO2-p7T-07Nqdz7MbNVKeYA2N6yO8hrHFWXCImEsykPDfSjmcJZQYPYme5mS3JNw%3D)**

subject: this fight is personal for me

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107466622/544766415/1722609566?refcode=250510_MaryTrump_DDF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTdiMTQ2My1jYjJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ewgmFdkw9qdUaY8Eic_Fg-Tic2iHiz47WT78JgUByJU=) Friends, I never needed political pundits or psychologists to tell me that my uncle Donald shouldn’t be anywhere near the Oval Office. I spent much of my childhood in the very house where Donald grew up. The cruel, weak, and deeply insecure man who brought our democracy to the brink of disaster is the same man I have always known. _Seeing him sworn in for a second time was an absolute gut punch._ This fight is personal for me, and as more people lose their jobs or have their rights and freedoms trampled, it’s becoming personal for them, too. **I’m committed to fighting back, but I’m under no illusion about the uphill battle we face. We need everyone to speak up.[Will you split a $25 donation between my org Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton to push back against my uncle and his dangerous, hateful agenda?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107466623/544766416/-204460493?refcode=250510_MaryTrump_DDF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTdiMTQ2My1jYjJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ewgmFdkw9qdUaY8Eic_Fg-Tic2iHiz47WT78JgUByJU=)** I launched the Democracy Defense Fund to build a grassroots movement to secure our electoral system from Donald and the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it. In order to finally defeat Donald once and for all, we must:
1. _**Flip the House.** The GOP’s majority is historically small and ripe for the taking, and if we retake the House, we can put a critical check on Donald’s power._

2. _**Take Back the Senate.** We need a Democratic majority in the Senate to fight back against judicial appointments and prevent Donald from securing a generation of MAGA rule._

3. _**Take the fight to the States.** We must continue to win critical gubernatorial elections and invest in flippable down-ballot races that have the potential to push back on Donald’s dangerous agenda through state legislatures._

4. _**Win in 2025.** Virginia, New Jersey, Louisiana, and Mississippi all have important legislative elections in 2025, and both New Jersey and Virginia will also hold gubernatorial elections._

**Winning big in these races would shift the narrative of GOP dominance and give Democrats serious momentum heading into a pivotal 2026 election cycle.** [**Can I count on you to help me build and grow the grassroots network we need to fight back against Donald, Elon Musk, and the GOP? If so, please split $25 between my org Democracy Defense Fund and Seth Moulton today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107466624/544766417/-204460493?refcode=250510_MaryTrump_DDF&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTdiMTQ2My1jYjJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ewgmFdkw9qdUaY8Eic_Fg-Tic2iHiz47WT78JgUByJU=) In solidarity, Dr. Mary L. I’m committed to fighting back, but I’m under no illusion about the uphill battle we face. We need everyone to speak up.= I launched the Democracy Defense Fund to build a grassroots movement to secure our electoral system from Donald and the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it. In order to finally defeat Donald once and for all, we must: 1. Flip the House. The GOP’s majority is historically small and ripe for the taking, and if we retake the House, we can put a critical check on Donald’s power. 2. Take Back the Senate. We need a Democratic majority in the Senate to fight back against judicial appointments and prevent Donald from securing a generation of MAGA rule. 3. Take the fight to the States. We must continue to win critical gubernatorial elections and invest in flippable down-ballot races that have the potential to push back on Donald’s dangerous agenda through state legislatures. 4. Win in 2025. Virginia, New Jersey, Louisiana, and Mississippi all have important legislative elections in 2025, and both New Jersey and Virginia will also hold gubernatorial elections. Winning big in these races would shift the narrative of GOP dominance and give Democrats serious momentum heading into a pivotal 2026 election cycle. = In solidarity, Dr. Mary L. Trump [content goes here] Seth Moulton for Congress PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress

name: Team Jayapal
subject: What running a grassroots campaign means in practice
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Pramila relies on grassroots supporters like you because she’s fighting for a government that puts working people first.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250510-5033-footer&t=1&akid=5033%2E420207%2ELhq7E_)
Peter, we talk a lot about running a grassroots campaign — but what does that mean in practice?
**$27.91**
_this year’s average online contribution_ **$0**
_raised from corporations or their PACs_ **18,000+**
_contributions so far this year_
---
It means Pramila’s counting on everyday people like you to [**pitch in an average online donation of just $27.91**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250510?refcode=em20250510-5033&amount=27.91&refcode2=5033_420207_Lhq7E_&akid=5033%2E420207%2ELhq7E_) to power her fight for working people — she doesn’t seek our billionaires to use as ATMs, and she doesn’t take a dime from corporations or their PACs.
While too many politicians are comfortable cozying up to billionaires who see their donations as a way to gain influence, Pramila relies on grassroots supporters like you because she’s fighting for a government that puts working people first.
**From Medicare For All to paid leave to immigration justice, a government that truly serves working people won’t materialize until millions of us across the country band together and fight for it.**
[**So Peter, if you’re ready to help us build the better world we know is possible, will you make your first grassroots donation of $27.91 or more today to power Pramila’s work for the progressive movement?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250510?refcode=em20250510-5033&amount=27.91&refcode2=5033_420207_Lhq7E_&akid=5033%2E420207%2ELhq7E_)
**[Contribute $27.91](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250510?amount=27.91&refcode=em20250510-5033&refcode2=5033_420207_Lhq7E_&akid=5033%2E420207%2ELhq7E_)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250510-5033-footer&t=2&refcode2=5033_420207_Lhq7E_&akid=5033%2E420207%2ELhq7E_)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=3&akid=5033%2E420207%2ELhq7E_)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=5033%2E420207%2ELhq7E_)

Peter, **In a town where corruption is currency and failure is rewarded, one man dared to do things differently.** Elon Musk stepped into Washington and launched the **Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE).** Not as a PR stunt . . . **But as a mission to cut waste, expose corruption, and put taxpayers like YOU first.** Despite the sneers from the Swamp... Despite the constant terror threats and attacks... **Elon delivered BIG for the American people:** **✅ BILLIONS in wasteful contracts -- GONE** **✅ RAMPANT Social Security fraud -- EXPOSED** **✅ MASSIVE federal bloat -- ELIMINATED** He put his entire career, reputation, and multi-billion Tesla empire in jeopardy – _just to do what’s right for his country_. **Now that his time at DOGE has come to an end, we’re asking 100,000 patriots like you to [send Elon a final “thank you" message](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/gRjF1fnFX-UB-aymLUU76w229TBPGDmEyQf_7NA32UwLxvdJy41byk55xvXXVuyh9EOkXsK8JVng8hbyeBKFYr2VL6rSynDiDkLyRInqLVKS36qzSHVhBv06Z7SK5vK7dn83KvtwoJytkCmBXGBZkvshWIxXGsxYwWDlECowT84WUL5mYVIIBwZL0nWRmsh8Trg3RtjCy-8VSxB7ZhvNHV2PXGaiFAHW4ls8KEetrS5x_f034qjFUn4Q61iqzrB3JpRC5sNZdXCYVMqoQ9oq38YfDTSsmD-zVml7kX8sMCfsnwHENoeSOwx0XB6cnW6kvZJpwuPmMwMzw4GysFcbJQPlcYFW323TrCX7JU_E78KbbuGm2kgStDNT68TWLjZlhsVxhNA8Dx4ADGS62DxsTuKLq-asp1PUYA-ZBurBX-8yI807scYwJpZKGzwga06-nHhjY3Bc_eGR7UTqWMVCLnwHRpO0avjOv0z8lXml-5b_NqrbKwSrkB2Xuwb8G8yZUUt5YG_Y/ani5vjjXeawFN7cLGCc45BXHNIOMGjFH/8).** **Thank you, Elon.** **We saw it. We supported it. And we want more of it.** _And who knows? _ **Maybe with enough support, he will come back and lead the _DOGE team full-time_.** But for now, we owe him a great deal of gratitude. **Please hurry— our thank you message to Elon closes at MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.** **_Will your name be on it?_**

name: Not Good Enough via Our Revolution
subject: Bernie is clear: "Resisting Trump is not good enough."
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1011&refcode=email-20250510_v&akid=8441%2E5885482%2EUz6Ka6 ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

Bernie Sanders isn’t holding back:

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25041?source=email-20250510&t=1061&akid=8441%2E5885482%2EUz6Ka6 ]Sanders to Democrats: Resistance to Trump 'not good enough'

He’s right – and if we’re EVER going to get out of this mess, Democrats
urgently need to recognize it.

Our Revolution is working every single day alongside Bernie to push
Democrats to reclaim a clear, bold, progressive vision – not just regain
power and preserve the structures that have failed working people for
decades.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250510nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8441%2E5885482%2EUz6Ka6 ]We’re mobilizing the grassroots, doing the work to win elections, and
holding our leaders to account. But we don’t take corporate money and
can’t do it without your support. Can you chip in right now to support Our
Revolution as we fight for the soul of the Democratic Party?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250510nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8441%2E5885482%2EUz6Ka6 ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250510nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8441%2E5885482%2EUz6Ka6 ]CHIP IN $22

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250510nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8441%2E5885482%2EUz6Ka6 ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250510nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8441%2E5885482%2EUz6Ka6 ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Here's the reality: Democrats haven’t succeeded because they’ve hesitated
to boldly confront corporate greed, exploding inequality, and climate
catastrophe. Instead, they’ve prioritized half-steps of watered-down
policies that don’t fundamentally change the lives of everyday Americans.

Right now, the Democratic party faces a choice. And Bernie made it clear
exactly what is at stake when he said: "The status quo is not working and
cannot continue to be defended. The American people desperately want this
country to move forward in a new direction: economically, politically,
socially and environmentally. And we are enormously proud that we’re
helping to shape that path. If we stand together, we have the power to
create a government and an economy that works for all of us, not just a
handful of billionaires."

This message is RESONATING – as was made clear by the electric Fighting
Oligarchy Tour. But right now, powerful interests and establishment
strategists like James Carville are working tirelessly to silence our
voices and slow our progress. Corporate lobbyists and big-money donors
know what's at stake – and they’re pouring millions into primary campaigns
against progressive candidates.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25041?source=email-20250510&t=1060&akid=8441%2E5885482%2EUz6Ka6 ]Headline: James Carville says Democrats need to stop letting Bernie
Sancers and AOC define the party

That's why we ALL must step up immediately and build the resources we need
to mobilize behind Bernie and elect revolutionary leaders across the
entire country.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250510nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8441%2E5885482%2EUz6Ka6 ]Will you stand alongside Bernie and Our Revolution with a contribution
today – helping build a Democratic Party that works for ALL of us, not
just billionaires?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

Hey there, As the Mayor of Los Angeles, my highest priority is to move Los Angeles forward. I want to make sure our agenda is aligned with the needs of Angelenos — and that’s why I want to hear from you. | Peter,

With Donald Trump is back in the White House, Republicans will control all three branches of government – _and they’re prepared to dismantle our way of life as they push through their dangerous vision for America._

During these uncertain times, it’s never been more important for all of us to come together in the fight against MAGA extremism.

In 2024, we raised over a half million dollars for Democratic candidates — all from grassroots donors like you.

Securing Democratic majorities in the House and Senate will take unprecedented energy. With so much on the line, it’s going to take all of us working together to stop Trump and his MAGA allies as they try to take us backward.

body:
This is a shocking attempt at intimidation, even by Trump standards. | | | Peter, **Newark Mayor Ras Baraka, the WFP-endorsed candidate for Governor of New Jersey, was arrested yesterday afternoon by armed federal agents, taken away in handcuffs after attempting to visit a recently re-opened ICE detention facility:** 1 [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T99msZK0ZODaBhX7ex1qF-vduitTWH2ntRV7J020eGazoQTA5X23ql3o9DxKlk_cblfKtXFwAz7axs7MuLjKdg6SaMgqhpxCZCBg7ehllPmSJvO8rOaUx6uap0pIxlTKgQko55QLL1lYz1zmpl7HSE-IgyBJxsFsi7XyIRNH_qDT3bcW35NBC93L64XcSPEXzvUHZATsMWvrkHYwBUQQIzj0ZdbDL5xxOMLya5HSRQE1m1Jrcbh-rg08NOVbj9Ft9Fa6k-wz8DhlT42qWF8ciuLQcNRQTfGLksqNEuQsUOSdtCJpryPcwcJg2knoolVrVuvi6JVEbZJHYiKOoTvvBv464GE4u52Nr4EpJznNpElQfxjaSpsajuMB-TKSd014ZM/4gd/F87QFBDATwi2t0fzPthWhg/h0/h001.0U0h202dL82Sj1JEnlm3pkkpxARkH98v-7Yz-5hTzQw) According to Rep. LaMonica McIver, who was part of a Congressional delegation visiting the facility at the same time, ICE agents shoved her, "manhandled Rep. Bonnie Watson Coleman, and arrested Mayor Baraka," even after he complied with their instructions.2 He was then detained for hours until being released later in the evening. **This is a shocking attempt at intimidation, even by Trump standards — one that is straight from the authoritarian playbook.** Trump and his people want to silence any of us who want to hold him accountable. **** [**Let's show them we won't be silent. clean_body: This is a shocking attempt at intimidation, even by Trump standards. | | | Peter, Newark Mayor Ras Baraka, the WFP-endorsed candidate for Governor of New Jersey, was arrested yesterday afternoon by armed federal agents, taken away in handcuffs after attempting to visit a recently re-opened ICE detention facility: 1 According to Rep. LaMonica McIver, who was part of a Congressional delegation visiting the facility at the same time, ICE agents shoved her, "manhandled Rep. Bonnie Watson Coleman, and arrested Mayor Baraka," even after he complied with their instructions.2 He was then detained for hours until being released later in the evening. This is a shocking attempt at intimidation, even by Trump standards — one that is straight from the authoritarian playbook. Trump and his people want to silence any of us who want to hold him accountable. ** The Working Families Party has joined a powerful coalition of progressive labor unions and advocates in New Jersey to endorse Mayor Ras Baraka for Governor. His record speaks for itself: community-based public safety, housing justice, and more. Now, the entire country is seeing his courage, too. New Jersey needs a Governor who will take on the private prison industry, stand up for working people, and be fearless in the face of the Trump administration's authoritarian threats. In solidarity, Team WFP Sources: 1\. , WNBC, May 9, 2025 2\. , BlueSky, May 9, 2025 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. body:
Because I know that you are so dedicated to the mission of ending abortion and building a culture where every life is cherished, I want you to know about a special opportunity to bless mothers in need through Live Action.

| [ ](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/430Op06NfRzqdmeL5xiexLkBnOQ3XcbB8pjiTcHvgUstF-UjejWmTQ7DQRUxmLJL_CzgFmqerfE8148jXAj4oX4aTNGPisEFe-scY7HopJ-em7Quf_5o8im2FcvBBm_1Yg4MnCX2S01TIYQ4P9YCJI8BBHvBf_zMSbeUkq9Jnkb_yoKNxT09W_9VwluCXaRPZ1WT513JV1Ao4vtT27UqlFU1HCqN6kH70p1-3avK1f26r96_R8Qjo-pAfiR3pP3qA92MctRCmJE7TbKUUKblQXh4SFw1C8LxULIzkJ6HMzgJEGmrOwq4IRpU286Ms0nvbmGvZKrQNs7txBAZz_iANNkI53MamTjQBYAYWEX5wEoXWSrvbEGFPD5SSYSQ3kiQXwAcZC6yO-oaVCMJqeqpU0ZE76P3Wk0ppPZIxIP6Nw/F6AV10PnOh2ADMdAW7YlWu_ybVBIqCY9/8)
