#
Dear Friend of Life,

Because I know that you are so dedicated to the mission of ending abortion and building a culture where every life is cherished, I want you to know about a **[special opportunity](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/OFRbCvYxCYxScbwBUUcNc__ci5e4Bj1uLIVV223XnciEBlCJcs4ISXLgG0OVHaAbiit20s0deG_03hVigiZR2q1-5NArBkbmTJv21jk3QG6Ud0HUcHY0aEGPiBtSSWL0SWMlILVg9qcHnQEHs3yEKYhSkQOtZd0itlDCx1FqNfMLCAlT-IhgdFW4HcJ4ErCliZaxCllenblew5dRLcNWltEGX4PrnSaTYsEXkFyVlnHuMYg531aCi5gtuyUSe9cJifMLVEc5i9qNT62vQgt950-DJY0XviRCrMCG67B47MqGgS-uey43BoO_vz6H9xEwtcm_uknaFT9gbkojbV2qWqpCRKgKysRxPk43dAe63SMA01SN4gvyoo5O0pLQNQuE-q_Pm6xvD1ndkW5vrH7l2qEbvBa-9f8Soiqb-odBtA/jA8gjcgEuZkCSx8Fm9zZHExGmbmNUygV/8)** to bless mothers in need through Live Action.

For women facing unexpected pregnancies, the journey of motherhood is too often a lonely and difficult one. I've heard this from so many mothers who have contacted Live Action for support.

Already this year, we have seen a major uptick in the number of women reaching out to us. Although counseling mothers is not the main mission of Live Action (other organizations cover that need), these women still seek us out for guidance because we are a trusted pro-life voice and reach a larger audience with the truth about abortion than any other pro-life organization.

Even after embracing life for their precious preborn babies, many women still face fear and uncertainty about the future. They need to know that both they and their babies are loved, valued, and cared for.

This Mother's Day, we want to do something special to meet this need, which is why we're partnering with pro-life pregnancy resource centers in Southern California to provide the mothers they serve with care packages to help them celebrate the gift of life.

**[Will you join us with a one-time gift of $65 to send a care package to a mother in need this Mother 's Day?](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/8dEX1kRKle7Dom4xl-GL24jszP6qXXSEi83338MZ_r9d8NxYl-ZWa4R87_98psN_ObFc36kXpdfb7NtKLcpRkinstAUpfvNX4WcFH0e5SGuOwqGXQvIKvFMSshkfnVv2DvJiZiEyeeQRyx104tsNmPURs25v89ZucdlOzmHINNI9t7Q8g2yOrRKvI_7MLoxiF5RrWePQZAPO3G3O_sxWF_Yo8SAbpu4oS9r_afJCfAx78Nnk-GQVqR-z9702E6IQY0Tw62zQOWV0T-ynJym-6Jj6S21owK_sRlhf-5uMC4E0jHWWj6AnOZ1EDjuxVtHiHJEn0WHEzORHXaAm9XTjU0QyCETLaxHeZtG5cg46pSnPiQVQYUhx92E_jo86E3_gjen55i9UNMvHB7dRCK-Rf_tFRLsLsQRG_z896p4T4g/LqWKa312o6-ads3pJzbGLFAyyawbNWWx/8)**

These care packages have been thoughtfully designed to celebrate both mother and baby. Each one contains:
* 10 EveryLife diapers
* A pack of EveryLife wipes
* A "Wonderfully Made" onesie
* A "Love Them Both" teddy bear
* A "Precious Feet" pin
* A bag of Seven Weeks coffee
* An exclusive Live Action "Mama" mug
* A "Window to the Womb" pamphlet

All of these items will be delivered inside a beautiful "it is good that you exist" tote bag to remind these mothers that their lives and the lives of their preborn babies are wonderful, unrepeatable gifts!

**Part of your donation will also go towards Live Action 's mission to help change minds and save lives. Click here to provide a care package and help save lives: [give.liveaction.org/send-a-care-package](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/t616ExdSL9IMmlbcAvlN81P8JlkJyUFLy8JrZT9hdsEzvuABMMqrBKimw4ptxdXXhiIElhQczkLmN-bLWr43GQagyfqyfuA4sVCjpCKBjnTHxlQgMjVeEv_SeqQf2RSdxuuk7bRwqhK4EI0W63cTOA_AygdcATV6WeBEDsBtIJnnZg1xCghYhFBybJQsrS8DuTBKphkaP4HEXFh9soEPtEfVk590cj09_WLQiQ-83OqD1q2FRwhwCNiIYprdH-h0AIMRc15uTEu4APq-jea2vK6d6zZW22tFoNQ-jhwNowCDGLtAPvy3h4sbprJMt9SvyNFV1IZuuyaEz7x8ln6ckhNHgeoMckuox0A_D5wDQUZXBYOxFDVXsbbPCN-rMlGaMZOvpSszqRhTRPIY2V5zIaexyLSsxDm1kQ9IneRdpg/MdBaKIrMISU1gvRIteHYHD72pt1InFpW/8)**

Thank you for your heart for mothers and babies and for your steadfast support of this life-saving mission.**
**
For Life,

Liz Urban
**Donor Service Manager**

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/6ueDo_xNWKfcxie1ZB9npUTp7riBDdxMX5fgUTghwpq7MQYJRPFXjWixJXJn0uo-y7kMXotTyyitaQ2MV5L2g-n0AmFVPJVZ3kIXNaXjoR_IBBZ0N_B5VU42lJWc1oqTlAS62oAvLUWTJxsqZW5qeuB_ci_5Jr1KtgHFjWd7_tE2sw_WVpXPgts2DN2iVSN_Q7Qde3YOVd40nctdRSS-KsLJ678ZlNeTRqhL6lHSRUFXYY1invcteePVVB6v1PP-XtgETBHMbv6JbugR9X2vUknD12JWfoEtio7I8Ac2uLLTyY_26R4ZlEXX-OhtUOxdWDzlSc_WZn2TV4kaNBDVxfJfyz6U9t5G-HHVxqZiIOr1aXXt83kR86y11NSVFMgc3uSng0f9JDtN5mkYADEzcSscvhWKEQycTKNMcLX_aQ/NfXtNU0Ln39NnppjdwAN5R-eApdop3lB/8)

clean_body: Because I know that you are so dedicated to the mission of ending abortion and building a culture where every life is cherished, I want you to know about a special opportunity to bless mothers in need through Live Action. | Dear Friend of Life, Because I know that you are so dedicated to the mission of ending abortion and building a culture where every life is cherished, I want you to know about a to bless mothers in need through Live Action. For women facing unexpected pregnancies, the journey of motherhood is too often a lonely and difficult one. I've heard this from so many mothers who have contacted Live Action for support. Already this year, we have seen a major uptick in the number of women reaching out to us. Although counseling mothers is not the main mission of Live Action (other organizations cover that need), these women still seek us out for guidance because we are a trusted pro-life voice and reach a larger audience with the truth about abortion than any other pro-life organization. Even after embracing life for their precious preborn babies, many women still face fear and uncertainty about the future. They need to know that both they and their babies are loved, valued, and cared for. This Mother's Day, we want to do something special to meet this need, which is why we're partnering with pro-life pregnancy resource centers in Southern California to provide the mothers they serve with care packages to help them celebrate the gift of life. These care packages have been thoughtfully designed to celebrate both mother and baby. Each one contains: 10 EveryLife diapers A pack of EveryLife wipes A "Wonderfully Made" onesie A "Love Them Both" teddy bear A "Precious Feet" pin A bag of Seven Weeks coffee An exclusive Live Action "Mama" mug A "Window to the Womb" pamphlet All of these items will be delivered inside a beautiful "it is good that you exist" tote bag to remind these mothers that their lives and the lives of their preborn babies are wonderful, unrepeatable gifts! Part of your donation will also go towards Live Action 's mission to help change minds and save lives. Click here to provide a care package and help save lives: Thank you for your heart for mothers and babies and for your steadfast support of this life-saving mission. For Life, Liz Urban Donor Service Manager 2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: Fighting to make housing more affordable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yassamin Ansari for Congress
body:
|
---
| | **"Ansari Introduces Housing Affordability Bill to Cap Rent at 20% of Income for Families on Housing Assistance"** | [PITCH IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107467978/544770870/1386253589?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250510_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTczNjlmNC1kMDJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uSxpld6ogxrmeQBk83erXKxjFWAZAU_EqvICEuv4UG8=)
---
Hey Peter, I wanted to share this with you.
While Republicans are making life more expensive for the hard-working families of this country, I’m still doing what I can to ease the burden.
That’s why I wrote and introduced the _HAVEN Act_ , which would increase the number of housing vouchers available, expand the number of families that are eligible to qualify for assistance, and reduce the overall amount that these families are paying each month in rent.
Rental prices are surging in the Valley and across the country, and low-income families are left struggling to make ends meet. As corporate landlords continue to exacerbate the problem and increase rent prices, more and more families are seeking assistance.
This critical program has primarily remained unchanged since it was created in the 1970s, and we need a housing voucher program that is more in line with where we’re at today. Only about 25% of households that qualify for assistance are actually awarded that assistance, most often due to funds running out.
**_**[I’m doing what I can to get this over the finish line, but I’ll be honest, we’re facing an uphill battle. Will you pitch in and stand with our team as we work to make housing more affordable nationwide?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107467979/544770872/1386253589?refcode=AU_YA_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250510_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTczNjlmNC1kMDJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uSxpld6ogxrmeQBk83erXKxjFWAZAU_EqvICEuv4UG8=)**_**

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: I’m running for re-election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Hey folks, I’m running for re-election to the U.S. Senate, and I hope you'll join me in the fight to give Colorado's priorities and values a voice in Washington.

[Let me tell you more about this decision, then will you split a donation between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project to help build this campaign from the ground up?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90057?t=6&akid=19817%2E878179%2EZwyt7C) | [DONATE NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90057?t=7&akid=19817%2E878179%2EZwyt7C)
---
Before diving into the world of politics, I took a chance, like so many small business owners do, and opened Denver's very first brewpub: Wynkoop Brewing Company. At Wynkoop, we were known for our unique beers like the Timberland Pale and Sagebrush Stout, which we offered at just $2.25 per pint – _a great deal compared to mainstream options!_

**Wynkoop was more than just a brewpub for me. It was a place where people with diverse viewpoints could come together, united by a shared love of good beer. It was a community where we proved time and again that there’s hardly anything that can’t be sorted out over a refreshing pint.**

Below are some nostalgic photos from the Wynkoop’s early days!
[ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90057?t=8&akid=19817%2E878179%2EZwyt7C)
I brought that same commitment to collaboration and problem-solving to public service—first as Mayor of Denver, then as Governor, and now as your U.S. Senator.

**And together, we’ve gotten things done:**

● Lowering prescription drug costs and capping insulin prices
● Investing in clean energy and fighting climate change
● Defending reproductive rights against far-right attacks
● Boosting jobs and small businesses to keep Colorado’s economy strong

**But there’s still so much more to do—and the stakes couldn’t be higher. Trump and National Republicans are tearing apart our progress, and corporate special interests will spend millions to try and take this seat back.**

[That’s why I need you in this fight. Will you split a donation now of $5—about the cost of two Wynkoop pints—to help us build a winning campaign?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90058?t=9&akid=19817%2E878179%2EZwyt7C)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between John Hickenlooper and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90059?t=10&akid=19817%2E878179%2EZwyt7C)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90060?t=11&akid=19817%2E878179%2EZwyt7C)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90061?t=12&akid=19817%2E878179%2EZwyt7C)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90062?t=13&akid=19817%2E878179%2EZwyt7C)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/90057?t=14&akid=19817%2E878179%2EZwyt7C)
I know we can win this the Colorado way—by bringing people together and solving problems.

Thanks for being part of the team.

Giddy up,

John
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19817%2E878179%2EZwyt7C). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19817%2E878179%2EZwyt7C).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19817%2E878179%2EZwyt7C) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=19817%2E878179%2EZwyt7C). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19817%2E878179%2EZwyt7C)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=19817%2E878179%2EZwyt7C)

name: History Facts
subject: Why is there a $2 bill?
body:
Without question, the $2 bill is the black sheep of the U.S. currency family.
---
Receiving too many emails? [I would like less mail](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw27n5&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

# [5 Things You Never Knew About the $2 Bill](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw27n5&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [U.S. History](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw27n5&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw27n5&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| W ithout question, the $2 bill is the black sheep of the U.S. currency family. Despite being such a small denomination, the “Tom” — nicknamed for its portrait of Thomas Jefferson — rarely surfaces in day-to-day transactions. But make no mistake, the $2 bill is very real and remains in regular circulation. Here are five fun facts about the not-so-terrible $2.

[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw27n5&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw27n5&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

clean_body: Without question, the $2 bill is the black sheep of the U.S. currency family. Receiving too many emails? | W ithout question, the $2 bill is the black sheep of the U.S. currency family. Despite being such a small denomination, the “Tom” — nicknamed for its portrait of Thomas Jefferson — rarely surfaces in day-to-day transactions. But make no mistake, the $2 bill is very real and remains in regular circulation. Here are five fun facts about the not-so-terrible $2. | Advertisement | More on Money | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | | ---|---|---|--- | | | From Our Network | | | Recommended Reading | | | ---|---|--- | | | ---|---|--- Advertisement | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- A daily digest of history's most fascinating happenings. | Want to unsubscribe? | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|--- Copyright © 2025 History Facts. name: Rep. Nancy Mace
subject: The man who wants to m—rder me isn’t being prosecuted.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM MACE
body:
#
[https://secure.winred.com/team-mace/20250505-flex7591-w-eml-threatened-to-kill-me?utm_campaign=067000000039020&utm_medium=email&xuno=666c657837353931&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

_THE MAN WHO THREATENED TO MURDER ME WALKS FREE._

[https://secure.winred.com/team-mace/20250505-flex7591-w-eml-threatened-to-kill-me?utm_campaign=067000000039020&utm_medium=email&xuno=666c657837353931&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

No charges. No investigation. No accountability.

This is Congresswoman Nancy Mace.

_I’VE BEEN STALKED WHILE RUNNING ERRANDS._ I’ve been physically
accosted. A man tried to throw a plant at my head during a town
hall.

I’VE BEEN FOLLOWED, HARASSED, AND THREATENED JUST FOR STANDING UP
FOR WOMEN.

_HERE ARE JUST A FEW OF THE SICK MESSAGES I’VE RECEIVED:
[https://secure.winred.com/team-mace/20250505-flex7591-w-eml-threatened-to-kill-me?utm_campaign=067000000039020&utm_medium=email&xuno=666c657837353931&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]_

“I’M GOING TO ASSASSINATE REPRESENTATIVE NANCY MACE WITH A GUN AND
I’M BEING 100% DEAD A##.”

“PREPARE TO DIE.”

“I’M GOING TO REPEATEDLY BASH YOUR HEAD IN.”

_And that’s just the beginning._

I’ve led the fight to protect women’s spaces—bathrooms, locker
rooms, and sports—from being overrun by radical gender ideology.

I INTRODUCED A BILL TO BAN BIOLOGICAL MEN FROM WOMEN’S
BATHROOMS—AND ALL HELL BROKE LOOSE.

IF I WERE A LEFTIST, THE DOJ WOULD’VE ALREADY ARRESTED THE GUY.

The media would be in hysterics. There would be protests and headlines
and prime-time coverage.

But because I’m a conservative woman, they look the other way.

_And let’s be honest: this isn’t just about me._

IF THEY’LL THREATEN A SITTING MEMBER OF CONGRESS—AND LET IT
SLIDE—WHAT DO YOU THINK THEY’LL DO TO YOU?

They don’t care about law and order. They don’t care about
women.

THEY CARE ABOUT ONE THING: CONTROL.

I’m holding the line in Congress. I’m not backing down.

_BUT I CAN’T FIGHT THIS BATTLE ALONE._

_Will you rush a donation right now to help me stand up to the Trans
Mob and the Radical Left?_
[https://secure.winred.com/team-mace/20250505-flex7591-w-eml-threatened-to-kill-me?utm_campaign=067000000039020&utm_medium=email&xuno=666c657837353931&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

[RUSH DONATION →]
[https://secure.winred.com/team-mace/20250505-flex7591-w-eml-threatened-to-kill-me?utm_campaign=067000000039020&utm_medium=email&xuno=666c657837353931&recurring=true&utm_term=lrm-active]

This isn’t politics-as-usual. This is a full-blown crisis of
justice.

_IF WE DON’T DRAW THE LINE RIGHT NOW, WE MAY LOSE THE COUNTRY WE
LOVE._

Thank you,

Nancy Mace

Congresswoman, South Carolina

PAID FOR BY TEAM MACE. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S
COMMITTEE.
Team Mace, 824 S. Milledge Ave., Ste. 101 Athens, GA 30605

## Neighbour row erupts in Polzeath as villagers fume over closure of footpath ‘used by residents for years’
Anger is mounting in the seaside village of Polzeath after developers closed a popular footpath without warning. Plymouth-based ModBox Developments has blocked off a 120ft section of path which residents have used for years. The closure, which took place on April 4, has sparked fury among locals and visitors to the Cornish village alike. name: signature requested | Left Action
subject: Sign: Tell Chief Justice Roberts to defend the Supreme Court from Trump’s power grab
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell the Supreme Court to stand up to Trump's power grab >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7dd838f5-33c8-497d-b4e3-589170d3af65/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1855a0dc-5e1c-4fad-94ef-f26c98d70141/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Trump and his allies are working to strip power from the judiciary and give it to the White House – but the Supreme Court conservative majority isn’t saying a word about it. Only the Democratic appointees in the minority are pushing back (most recently, Justice Jackson). Chief Justice John Roberts is notably quiet as a church mouse, even though he is the head of the Judicial branch, and was recently sued by a group called America First, which was founded by Trump lackey Stephen Miller. Here’s [more](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc222bb28-c587-4484-b180-b4e03a49ef9e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) on the lawsuit: The case ostensibly proceeds as a FOIA lawsuit, with the Trump-aligned group seeking access to judiciary records. But, in doing so, it asks the courts to cede massive power to the White House: the bodies that make court policy and manage the judiciary’s day-to-day operations should be considered independent agencies of the executive branch, the suit argues, giving the President, under the conservative legal movement’s theories, the power to appoint and dismiss people in key roles. This is a massive power grab by Trump, it guts the judicial branch in defiance of the Constitution, and the Supreme Court needs to stand up to him. Trump is hoping his hand-picked Supreme Court Justices will allow him to continue on his path to dictator unchecked. They need to come out strong against this lawsuit and act as a check on Trump – or the consequences will be dire. [Sign your name to demand the Supreme Court stand up to Trump's power grab >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8f71c73a-ee1c-4197-bd19-1d5aaa24c590/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | | [ADD YOUR NAME >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta048d059-72dd-4bb2-8257-416bfdb2c3db/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

body:

Peter, it’s Valerie Foushee –

Let’s be clear: **Trump’s latest _(and illegal)_ executive order to defund PBS and NPR is a direct attack on our kids, our classrooms, and our local communities.**

As a former school board member, I’m fighting back in Congress to protect these public broadcasting services that provide education, entertainment, and fact-based information for our children. [Will you sign my short petition to stand up for PBS and NPR and demand Congress to protect these services that so many families rely on?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107468646/544773215/-2015135983?source=SBD_VF_EM_PET_050925_PBSNPR_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDE5YTE4NS1kODJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vbK0h67bm1YqEYS4Ck9yxSazlP48kgGonBLCym-Fk9M=&emci=03a85e33-d12d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=9019a185-d82d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=799895) | [SIGN ON → PROTECT PBS & NPR](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107468648/544773218/-2015135983?source=SBD_VF_EM_PET_050925_PBSNPR_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDE5YTE4NS1kODJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vbK0h67bm1YqEYS4Ck9yxSazlP48kgGonBLCym-Fk9M=&emci=03a85e33-d12d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=9019a185-d82d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=799895)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107468651/544773220/-2015135983?source=SBD_VF_EM_PET_050925_PBSNPR_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDE5YTE4NS1kODJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vbK0h67bm1YqEYS4Ck9yxSazlP48kgGonBLCym-Fk9M=&emci=03a85e33-d12d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=9019a185-d82d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=799895)
When I first ran for office, it was to serve on the Chapel Hill-Carroboro Board of Education — **because I wanted every child to have access to high quality education, no matter their zip code or background.**

I’ve seen first-hand how public broadcasting provides free, accessible programming that allows every child to nurture their literacy and social development. PBS shows like _Sesame Street_ teach our kids how to build relationships and resolve conflicts, while NPR’s educational content helps them read and understand the world around them.

Trump’s political stunt to defund PBS and NPR directly threatens the future of our kids — especially those who come from rural or underserved communities where public broadcasting might be the _only_ source of news and entertainment.

**As someone who’s spent her career fighting for education, I won’t stand for this.** That’s why me and my Democratic colleagues are leading the fight to safeguard PBS and NPR and continue funding their critical services that our families rely on.

[If you’re with me in this fight, please take a second to sign my petition to demand Congress to protect funding for PBS and NPR and stop Trump's attacks on public broadcasting.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107468653/544773223/-2015135983?source=SBD_VF_EM_PET_050925_PBSNPR_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDE5YTE4NS1kODJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vbK0h67bm1YqEYS4Ck9yxSazlP48kgGonBLCym-Fk9M=&emci=03a85e33-d12d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=9019a185-d82d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=799895)
[SIGN ON → PROTECT PBS & NPR](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/107468657/544773225/-2015135983?source=SBD_VF_EM_PET_050925_PBSNPR_180DO_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTc5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDE5YTE4NS1kODJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vbK0h67bm1YqEYS4Ck9yxSazlP48kgGonBLCym-Fk9M=&emci=03a85e33-d12d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&emdi=9019a185-d82d-f011-8b3d-6045bded8cca&ceid=799895)

Thank you,

Valerie Foushee

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Peter, it’s Valerie Foushee – Let’s be clear: Trump’s latest (and illegal) executive order to defund PBS and NPR is a direct attack on our kids, our classrooms, and our local communities. As a former school board member, I’m fighting back in Congress to protect these public broadcasting services that provide education, entertainment, and fact-based information for our children. | When I first ran for office, it was to serve on the Chapel Hill-Carroboro Board of Education — because I wanted every child to have access to high quality education, no matter their zip code or background. I’ve seen first-hand how public broadcasting provides free, accessible programming that allows every child to nurture their literacy and social development. PBS shows like Sesame Street teach our kids how to build relationships and resolve conflicts, while NPR’s educational content helps them read and understand the world around them. Trump’s political stunt to defund PBS and NPR directly threatens the future of our kids — especially those who come from rural or underserved communities where public broadcasting might be the only source of news and entertainment. As someone who’s spent her career fighting for education, I won’t stand for this. That’s why me and my Democratic colleagues are leading the fight to safeguard PBS and NPR and continue funding their critical services that our families rely on. Thank you, Valerie Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. Hey folks — Michigan Governor Gretchen Whitmer here with an important request.
**[_Can you donate right now to the Nevada Democratic Party? A lot is riding on our work in the coming months, and your support goes a long way._](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTKd9ti0AAuVBvrvIXLqJPsYnA0fcxIa5VJKcjT4aCiC-yZGFBNotfxp4b752ktRxmKYaagPXdOorxwI74bDiiteDrqcWpM-QzziaI9AVi9ifL2_yX_wyxvZIRaFFk1e3tXy9GS8tUfi2WyXTOppFy1knWCZOXHfoyjHYENevaLWDxMM85L62Tu09XPCvq8jRc5S1s79tg68rJ_k5ykhYj2A2AYZ6149ZUxVBM_zY7kjbXiyfa5sjCzlV-QRQWm1zBrkUhCF3pRhmnH2U_dnuPYBX1cYzC3Zdqyye4OWVOiazC4A1clqsQAbNCigDFl500Cs7jbRuQzq26lQN7w4snxH5_k-wtDVpmrEhsfZVnmnPdIr8G8ccEC-TJg4cOSP5z/4gd/aODTpUwTSu6rkweW62INpA/h1/h001.LXUKq-3P_bzKXuUDS4fYLtDep-rZP6KtfdIMyY2u6wI)**

**A lot is on the line in Michigan, Nevada, and beyond next year.** Voters will head to the polls to elect candidates up and down the ballot — which means that we _really_ need to hit the ground running _now_.
Your support will help us invest early in top races, train candidates and staff, and ultimately elect leaders who will put working families first.
All eyes are on states like Nevada and Michigan, meaning we need to start _right now_ to win in the toughest races.
If we’re falling behind where we need to be in our fundraising, the right wing could spend big and defeat the candidates who will fight for us.
[**_So I’m personally asking you, friend: Can you please give $10 or more to the Nevada Democratic Party to help them fight like hell to elect Democrats up and down the ballot?_**](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTKd9ti0AAuVBvrvIXLqJPsYnA0fcxIa5VJKcjT4aCiC-yZGFBNotfxp4b752ktRxmiCutAUtzxmN1HnLtb3W9cEgGL5h_Vde2cgYCrbg_sgViKxrRSn3gaZ4B5tIik2F2nnAuoCmlMO8kKfdYDyaArAYVjDyn59g13NLQs2c9zzaMtoQDCEGKPKXtMimmQBNCaaV2mFWwbPvYzXQB_TzLfcEODERSkS79CYlmvEKnOPrJFOkRy39jp9Yt0ulWco-Xkbw5Dx7dWSjHNvYnhhRPNrobReMRP8j9nKFp6ZBE2qzpw9fgV-0HiplTdO8RkNN-hzSKKlUYHEf0JM9lHt7_kh6QYFHM8MkPYXfWKU2DWMk2nE9rnvCUbO-H_edMrASF/4gd/aODTpUwTSu6rkweW62INpA/h3/h001.SOyLq4INASeqfwiG4AnJla0q5ovICgQS7u6bw-uHilc)

_Dear Fellow Conservative,_

_**[We have some disturbing news to share with you.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a9ac10d3e9a1489d99be98d13c27ec21&_e=G-cKV9qNceThDgzD5geo7bUlGAiRn8YDCuF4_3s4hIDoBJSf5kahNBrq0umSikw_ODu0Wqfo46SAai51qHfGpbPU9t3D4pNuezsOs23NZTm6_dN_GaKfo-gQ7mb99HCqHvSrkRhIsNSrOU0QzwGVPUHzqEcC38zugg-m60qqrxT1w3xG5CycMnOQ0OP7gmgymnb0uMYycIY8UweOs2wZ2u7SkCSBmedrMXa2p_53DF9vUiwn0-YzH_ldMAFMEvoEZQc5oF1RiaN56xTbz2Mxj2ObekcDrfS2jQbHYj1AmC5CY5CdABGXcPG15pLSPDtllFF7j7J1B3TA6WnAQ6iHgSq5IbVFMi2WEA7Xf_zyMYcNpad6_KS5KKu6Dz43_5AiAMQj9D2pWLRXw-gsWPKGEw%3D%3D "We have some disturbing news to share with you.")**_ Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez (AOC) has just become the de facto leader of the Democrat Party. And her radical agenda is a threat to everything we hold dear.

Imagine a country where the government controls every aspect of your life, from your healthcare to your paycheck, a country where the socialist ideology of AOC and her allies reign supreme.

**This is not a hypothetical scenario.** AOC's rise to power is real, and her policies are already being implemented. _[She's using her massive social media following and record-breaking fundraising to spread her radical message and build a movement of far-left activists.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=a9ac10d3e9a1489d99be98d13c27ec21&_e=G-cKV9qNceThDgzD5geo7bUlGAiRn8YDCuF4_3s4hIDoBJSf5kahNBrq0umSikw_ODu0Wqfo46SAai51qHfGpbPU9t3D4pNuezsOs23NZTm6_dN_GaKfo-gQ7mb99HCqHvSrkRhIsNSrOU0QzwGVPUHzqEcC38zugg-m60qqrxT1w3xG5CycMnOQ0OP7gmgymnb0uMYycIY8UweOs2wZ2u7SkCSBmedrMXa2p_53DF9vUiwn0-YzH_ldMAFMEvoEW9BVG-sTbZMF--xzpusEZ8q0x2Zt-CWMBGHAH7-ixgn_VcfaZjnIPQEe_xsOYBZkAV-mFWIHtuVhaya2QTI45SY7q_hJ6N6BCN5jF3o14pKh6ZafujpHfHsW-7l6lG4HEjm-udCdYmKdQaqrcMerSw%3D%3D "She's using her massive social media following and record-breaking fundraising to spread her radical message and build a movement of far-left activists.")_

_**But here's the thing:** _**we can still stop her.** We can still expose her radical policies and build a grassroots movement to counter her influence. We can still elect conservative leaders who will stand up to her extremist agenda.

_**[And that's where you come in to end this madness. name: Mazie Hirono
subject: He doesn’t care about students, teachers, or families.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
I’m not one to mince words, Peter: **Donald Trump doesn’t care about students, teachers, educators, or families. All he cares about are his billionaire buddies and securing tax breaks for them. ** I attended a spotlight hearing this week with my colleague Senator Patty Murray, where we heard from educators, advocates, and parents concerned about the Trump administration’s cuts to the Department of Education. _It was alarming, to say the least. _ Kids, especially low-income students, students with disabilities, or students in rural areas, will suffer because of these cuts. College students, already struggling to pay for their education, will pay _even more_ and carry burdensome student loan debts. **Meanwhile, Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and their allies are lining their own pockets off the backs of students. ** We cannot let them rob our children, Peter. That’s why I’m fighting every day in the Senate to protect the American people from their dangerous ideas. **[But I can’t do it alone. clean_body: | I’m not one to mince words, Peter: Donald Trump doesn’t care about students, teachers, educators, or families. All he cares about are his billionaire buddies and securing tax breaks for them. I attended a spotlight hearing this week with my colleague Senator Patty Murray, where we heard from educators, advocates, and parents concerned about the Trump administration’s cuts to the Department of Education. It was alarming, to say the least. Kids, especially low-income students, students with disabilities, or students in rural areas, will suffer because of these cuts. College students, already struggling to pay for their education, will pay even more and carry burdensome student loan debts. Meanwhile, Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and their allies are lining their own pockets off the backs of students. We cannot let them rob our children, Peter. That’s why I’m fighting every day in the Senate to protect the American people from their dangerous ideas. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for standing with me, Mazie Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

These days the name antifa gets thrown around like a political football, an all-encompassing label for anyone committing acts of violence and/or arson while wearing dimly colored disguises in American streets. But then again, all-black attire with a face mask just so happens to be the best outfit to wear no matter what crime one may want to commit.
The nebulous group named Antifa emerged out of a vain effort to stop the rise of Fascism in Germany and Western Europe during Hitler and Mussolini's rise to power in the 1920's 1930's. Antifa was born out of the same Marxist cradle that Bolshevism grew out of and it has shared goals with the Communists ever since. After it translated from Fascist Europe to the freedom of the United States, Antifa has remained a clandestine group nonetheless.
In the 1980's, Antifa re-emerged in the American midwest as a left-wing response to the skinheads that stormed the punk scene with swastikas tattooed on their arms. Antifa brawled with actual skinheads who showed up to rock concerts waving Nazi flags.
Three or four decades later, Antifa has been resurrected as a movement to oppose all things Trump and the new right. Inherent to the group's resuscitation is the assessment that Trump is a Nazi and so are his supporters; ipso facto members of Antifa have a duty to punch Trump supporters in the face.
This notion has been fueled and legitimized by well-paid pundits who have thrown the "Trump is a Nazi" Hail Mary into the airwaves for darn near ten years.
* * *
Thus far under Trump 2.0, the protests that I have seen in DC have been numerous, but mostly maskless old white folks who are mad that Big Balls at DOGE is firing them from their federal jobs or cutting off funding to their USAID-sponsored NGO.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/777be60d-303f-4ce3-801a-c167edd8ac46?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**[But at the University of Washington in Seattle last week](https://substack.com/redirect/c6254610-12f2-4b69-b301-a5784ba4d44c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ,** Trump 2.0 protests-turned riots showed early hallmarks of tactics of the black-bloc-clad agitators we saw wreak havoc in the past.
**[Footage shows masked individuals carrying wooden or plastic shields as they confronted Seattle Police.](https://substack.com/redirect/01cd8c2c-cad6-496b-83c9-247808297765?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** The black bloc-clad mob was at least organized enough to muster a shield line and light a fire. The shields themselves are enough to assume that the individuals carrying them are intending to confront the police, though labeling them all as Antifa is an additional leap that is difficult to make by design.
The question is not if Antifa will take to the streets again in Trump's second term, but when?
The left has claimed, and will claim, that Antifa is just a myth. It's certainly not a myth, it's a decentralized group of cells straight out of the insurgency playbook.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**
* * *
**[Together With Mode Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/c3bf0e43-43e3-4b67-bc34-4d09d8633f54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Apple 's Starlink Update Sparks Huge Earning Opportunity**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c3bf0e43-43e3-4b67-bc34-4d09d8633f54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Apple just secretly added Starlink satellite support to iPhones through iOS 18.3.
One of the biggest potential winners? **[Mode Mobile.](https://substack.com/redirect/c3bf0e43-43e3-4b67-bc34-4d09d8633f54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Mode's EarnPhone already reaches +45M users that have earned over $325M, and that's before global satellite coverage. With SpaceX eliminating "dead zones" worldwide, Mode's earning technology can now reach billions more in unbanked and rural populations worldwide.
Their global expansion is perfectly timed, and you still have a chance to **[invest in their pre-IPO offering at just $0.30/share](https://substack.com/redirect/c3bf0e43-43e3-4b67-bc34-4d09d8633f54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[.](https://substack.com/redirect/c3bf0e43-43e3-4b67-bc34-4d09d8633f54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Mode's recent 32,481% revenue growth and their newly reserved Nasdaq ticker $MODE puts them one step closer to a potential IPO.
**[Earn up to 100% bonus shares by investing at $0.30/share now.](https://substack.com/redirect/c3bf0e43-43e3-4b67-bc34-4d09d8633f54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Invest Now](https://substack.com/redirect/c3bf0e43-43e3-4b67-bc34-4d09d8633f54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Piece continues)**
The shadowy group has been given oxygen to breathe within the expansive protest ecosystem that exploded since the Trump era. The flames were further fanned by the pandemic and the election of 2020. Antifa doesn't have to sponsor a protest to show up and agitate police or vandalize public property. And this is exactly what they did during the widespread Black Lives Matter demonstrations during the so-called "Summer of Love."
I embedded with these black bloc-clad shield-wielders countless times in dozens of cities. The degree of sophistication and determination can vary wildly based on the location and the times.
Within these black bloc marches, it's difficult to discern who is actually Antifa ready to punch a so-called Nazi in the face, and who's just a hapless twitter follower looking for a cause. Most of these people wouldn't (or couldn't) hurt a fly. I imagine marching behind a shield is a gratifying form of LARP (live-action-role-playing), a mechanism by which listless young Americans are given a cause in the absence of a well-paying job and a well-built family home.
At least nine out of ten times that I ask someone "are you Antifa?" they will say, "no." And if I ask too many times more, I won't last very long before I am shouted out or worse. The irony here being that Antifa's desire to remain anonymous forces them to engage in the same fascistic tactics that they claim to oppose.
Interviews are given from behind masks, glasses and goggles. Unsanctioned interviews are blocked by umbrellas and in some cases more extreme force.
In cases I witnessed firsthand in front of the Federal Courthouse in Portland (**[and which I covered extensively in my book](https://substack.com/redirect/4b10da6e-9cf7-4244-abb9-7a44adfbe7e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**), these cells were organized enough to make molotov cocktails, paint bombs, feces bombs, piss bombs, shoot fireworks galore, and even employ surreal measures like metal saws to cut fences and leaf blowers to blow tear gas back at the cops.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9456ae4f-9b13-4abb-9863-5e23fa3f5407?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5450b5e5-3436-4927-9568-2de65eb6d36e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/abf5386a-b965-40c0-ae76-c820a893e5c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The majority of these people are not discussing tactics in encrypted chats, they're out there because they are lost and afraid and social media convinced them that if they take to the streets then they can destroy the evil Drumpf. But it only takes a few hardcore agitators to create a riotous spectacle of violence between rioters and the cops. Thus even a small number of Antifa can turn a mostly peaceful protest into one that is anything but.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6c01a455-a68c-4529-aa7b-701fa558edaa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b5ea1f1d-1fd5-4d7b-8048-a6826c8bb183?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As demonstrated last week and in the widespread anarchy of 2020, Antifa's most sophisticated cells are in the Pacific Northwest. Here, Antifa commands a strong enough presence to field demonstrations of their own, rather than piggy-backing to create chaos within the picketing of more public-facing groups. Antifa social media accounts with faceless avatars will tell everyone to don black bloc and wear masks.
So what does a member of Antifa actually look like? I would characterize actual "Antifa" as those who privately pledge allegiance to the group. They show up to protests geared up for a scrap with who they deem to be fascist cops. Yet assessing who actually pledges allegiance to Antifa based solely upon attire or umbrellas can be difficult to discern for obvious reasons, and that is by design.
They don't carry membership cards and have no centralized manifesto to which they must adhere. This is awfully convenient as the never-Trump arm of the Democrat party seeks to downplay Antifa's iron-fisted role in America's latest civil unrest. In short, Antifa serves as the radical wing to Anti-Trumpism in the United States. They seamlessly integrate themselves with self-proclaimed anti-fascist protesters, intentionally muddying the waters between who is a mostly peaceful protester and who is a hardcore rioter intent on creating as much violence and chaos as they can.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0bf740da-5da3-469b-a67e-743608379128?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
The secretive nature of the Antifa was warranted when it was subverting the boot of the Nazi death march, although it makes less sense in a public street in America where people have the right to ask questions and exercise their free speech.
Integral to Antifa's continued secrecy are the tactics of violent intimidation at public demonstrations within the United States. For this reason, I believe that the group is incompatible with the American way of life. Anyone who understands how Antifa functions and supports free speech should condemn the group regardless of party or supplemental creeds.
Now that the Rona scare is over, though I was never a fan of masks or needles in the first place, let's remember that we live in America where we have the right to protest but not to the right to remain anonymous and punch other people just because of what they think.

name: Hillsdale College via Victory Mailings
subject: What is our purpose?
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj204nl2w6xrn6fzbl5maz8plbmhtrtjq4xcsfwog1b71wbjjql6w9yl42oulmo9s29x0711fgh3tf4p7ij9r&__stmp=sw2d3w&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw2d3w&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jzl2oojl38q5sj61tr9deo2fp76mbxjgabtk0zy3hcr4tb2il65o30a8gcae89x84tmh2qdp7vgojqc1z1xszwbhprd272oguvm5d802ad7t305rbc21ytodmcbjbzyonf85z6b4g2ntnb3abdtj&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw2d3w&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw2d3w&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw2d3w&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw2d3w&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jzl2oojl38q5sj61tr9deo2fyg8cjphbsybpbfld230lnlegbpeu9w4d19etah0m0qp72k78m7aa9uris6bom6ly2ow140zgrm50xc0b178lpjgydz5a9sl0lzlh6t5ia2jurzo4b416fq6lzrju&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw2d3w&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sw2d3w&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

body:
Trump doesn't want you to fight back. |

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/107469972/544778166/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE524_20250510_ActBlueEOMRS_ALL&sourceid=1056069&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxODA3MjFiZC1lMTJkLWYwMTEtOGIzZC02MDQ1YmRlZDhjY2EiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oqC0Hu6kfyC2A7vtUZSH6lFh98I5mnnxgahATHA6vrM=) Peter,

You've probably heard by now that last month, Trump took aim at **ActBlue** , the online fundraising platform used by Democratic campaigns across the country. When this administration and its allies come after the tools that power progressive grassroots giving, they're not just targeting Democratic candidates and organizations. They're targeting _you_.

They're targeting the small-dollar donors who chip in $5, $15, or $50 at a time — and in doing so, make it possible for Democratic pro-choice women to launch campaigns, flip seats, and take back political power.

That's what scares them. Not our platform — our _people_.

And now that the Trump administration has made it clear just how afraid they are of us? It's time to double down. [**We're working to stay ready for whatever comes next. clean_body: Trump doesn't want you to fight back. | = Peter, You've probably heard by now that last month, Trump took aim at ActBlue , the online fundraising platform used by Democratic campaigns across the country. When this administration and its allies come after the tools that power progressive grassroots giving, they're not just targeting Democratic candidates and organizations. They're targeting you. They're targeting the small-dollar donors who chip in $5, $15, or $50 at a time — and in doing so, make it possible for Democratic pro-choice women to launch campaigns, flip seats, and take back political power. That's what scares them. Not our platform — our people. And now that the Trump administration has made it clear just how afraid they are of us? It's time to double down. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let's show them exactly who they're up against. Thanks for taking a stand, the EMILYs List team = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? name: Tiffany
subject: really need your help

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23053%2E4449941%2EsAtr1x) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23053%2E4449941%2EsAtr1x) Hi – Tiffany Muller here.

My team gave me your name because you’re a top Fight for Reform active member, and I really need your help.

With everything that Donald Trump is doing just three months into his term, I’ve been working day and night to make sure our 2026 strategy is as rock solid as possible.

_Not winning back the House is not an option._

[**So please, can you begin your 2026 Democratic Strategy Survey at your personalized link below?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61126?t=3&akid=23053%2E4449941%2EsAtr1x) | [BEGIN YOUR SURVEY →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61126?t=4&akid=23053%2E4449941%2EsAtr1x)
---
There’s a lot at stake next year.

Donald Trump has said keeping the House is his top priority. And he has millions from Dark Money donors lined up, ready and waiting to make it happen.

We have limited resources, but I know that we can win back the House next year. I just need to know your thoughts on what we should prioritize going forward.

[**I’ll keep your survey open for another 12 hours, so make sure your responses are in → **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61126?t=5&akid=23053%2E4449941%2EsAtr1x)
[BEGIN YOUR SURVEY →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/61126?t=6&akid=23053%2E4449941%2EsAtr1x)
---
I’ll be waiting for your response, so please don’t let me down.

Tiffany Muller
_President, Fight for Reform_

Your support is critical to helping us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.
With your support we can harness the power of our grassroots supporters to influence decision makers and put control back in the hands of the people.

clean_body: | Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending Citizens United state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, If you would like to unsubscribe, Hi – Tiffany Muller here. My team gave me your name because you’re a top Fight for Reform active member, and I really need your help. With everything that Donald Trump is doing just three months into his term, I’ve been working day and night to make sure our 2026 strategy is as rock solid as possible. Not winning back the House is not an option. | There’s a lot at stake next year. Donald Trump has said keeping the House is his top priority. And he has millions from Dark Money donors lined up, ready and waiting to make it happen. We have limited resources, but I know that we can win back the House next year. I just need to know your thoughts on what we should prioritize going forward. I’ll be waiting for your response, so please don’t let me down. The Radical Left will do ANYTHING they can to stop our President. Why? Because they HATE that he is MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. They’ve impeached him, jailed him, and even SHOT HIM. But real MAGA heroes like YOU have never lost faith, not even for a second. So, will you stand with Pres. Trump during the IMPEACHMENT 3.0 SHAM?? This latest impeachment attack on Trump is RUSSIA, RUSSIA, RUSSIA all over again. These “whackjobs” haven’t got a clue that we will NEVER abandon Trump. body:
Team,
I wanted you to see this right away. We’re hearing rumors that a new opponent is about to jump into this race, and we have to be ready. I’m counting on this team to help us stay strong — please read below and chip in if you can. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg?refcode=250510-email]
Thanks,
Jena
----- Original Message -----
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg?refcode=250510-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg?refcode=250510-email]
We wanted you to hear it from us first: we’re hearing serious rumors that a new opponent could be entering this race.
We don’t know exactly when they’ll make it official. But here’s what we do know: we need to be ready.
Rush in a donation of $10 right now to help us prepare for whatever comes next! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg?refcode=250510-email&amount=10]
Running a strong, winning campaign takes resources. It takes grassroots supporters like you stepping up early, so we’re prepared for anything that comes our way.
Every contribution helps us stay strong, stay competitive, and stay focused on what matters: fighting for justice, freedom, and opportunity for every Coloradan.
If you can, please contribute today to help us build the war chest we need to be prepared for a new opponent and to protect Coloradans' rights. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2505-q2-jg?refcode=250510-email]
Thanks for standing with us. Let's show them we’re ready for anything!
Jena for AG

name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: While the GOP descends into chaos, we’re executing a plan.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-flipasenateseat?refcode=050925_4 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-flipasenateseat?refcode=050925_4]
Republicans are already tearing each other apart over this Senate seat, and we are LOVING it... because while they fight each other, we're putting together a plan to WIN.
Cornyn. Paxton. Maybe someone worse. It doesn’t matter who wins their internal power grab — we’re preparing to beat all of them.
That means we need to be ready to help Texas Democrats:
✅ Identify key voter drop-off zones from 2022
✅ Expand rural outreach and Spanish-language media
✅ Train local candidates to run down-ballot
✅ Build rapid-response infrastructure to counter GOP disinfo
✅ Fill their warchest NOW so they don’t get outspent early in the gameWe’ve seen what happens when Democrats start late. We’re not doing that again.
Will you chip in $10 today to help us fund this plan from the ground up? This is how we flip the Senate seat. This is how we win Texas. And this is how we stop MAGA from steamrolling our future. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-flipasenateseat?refcode=050925_4]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-flipasenateseat?express_lane=true&refcode=050925_4&amount=5]

Make no mistake: This isn’t just about Texas. This is about the future of the Senate. The future of our economy. The future of our democracy.
Trump and Paxton want to burn it all down. We can stop them — if we start fighting back today . [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-flipasenateseat?refcode=050925_4]
Let’s go.

We don’t know about you, but we think throwing a taxpayer funded $100 MILLION military parade for a FIVE time draft dodging coward and felon who had repeatedly disrespected our soldiers is one dumb idea and a complete waste of money.
Trump is crashing our economy and telling working families to ration toys for their kids, but it’s totally cool to spend HUGE sums of OUR money on 6,600 marching troops, tanks in the street, and fighter jets to stroke his ego. Sounds like banana republic BS, right?
_Talk about waste, fraud and abuse!_
__**[We aren’t having it. There is NO value in a birthday parade for a dictator wannabe. Tell Washington DC’s Mayor Bowser to BLOCK Trump’s megalomaniacal self tribute!](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38ruSGksc-5zuBT2ndfJZx3XlbZpmgt9EkWTxBt0mn1Sq_i6vwa97hwWFm_EDr_hjxzaDq0A-lnMNARBCATYL-64TDurQmZNixrH3MfE2ceryiJdZIJsbH4vUhNOeK9Rr7x23p1G2tIFQ8hgZF8JT1P3r2C-L9UqxNPu9_upDdmrJLmWYrIu8ud3JA-T2CDQ-7XhoSyf6X4q2-e8FIQzLgz6f5P7haN8FJvrneoOJJDlGC4CCo8o9qOjlnQFHSOML8yPrQ1iMLq3TtWEvH7SPEpXwIjUMnPdsXsZDHkZvFn4TmO4GwoIeQpx75mPgno9QPBHYfB-75eN3CC34ne5aJx0TouSDx_pTytMHYeZL5hY7UKBFG4-WQy9-d3WJ-h0rgavnOLeqLQSEUQuXeuRYhysHFhoRYOByvQxKR6WyGoLtW2KT66K8FW3xh4TcQQrS_CKwpOmaEZS4g46_F3PsiycSqtePFOnewLlExr4e6-Qw/4gd/xTOXN4M5Q3CvrvOjOR1WNA/h2/h001.kTblQDMN_BHUcwVHHcqTNCK5bywB-2BKGXhD1dyzGYY)** [SIGN ON](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38ruSGksc-5zuBT2ndfJZx3XlbZpmgt9EkWTxBt0mn1Sq_i6vwa97hwWFm_EDr_hjxzaDq0A-lnMNARBCATYL-64TDurQmZNixrH3MfE2ceryiJdZIJsbH4vUhNOeK9Rr7x23p1G2tIFQ8hgZF8JT1P3r2C-L9UqxNPu9_upDdmrJLmWYrIu8ud3JA-T2CDQ-7XhoSyf6X4q2-e8FIQzLgz6f5P7haN8FJvrneoOJJDlPRtfie2fiR3pP6B_kyG3GNKQBklcnJ0__47nATVCUvDzh3Iq-uUxoPnFNr-lAooncN7uO_zOhpPefSi6k_gXx6FG_pJ7z5IDCtkB4dxYNDIi0Q08nRn6v-eFiCMuT67JeWUlURMkIdQIifyHpEoHYEFV8AZlKZ4PGDE0AwQ32xKlBUZnp3Ww2kBx1ZjX8NE6p7Hc95skH4y0oRuHJefx-p0taTEOTAf0pT9psDyze9XcZtVtP_KELY5ETOXrxc2Zg/4gd/xTOXN4M5Q3CvrvOjOR1WNA/h3/h001.ENvmoSzYo6FP7uQjStg7phpI2KDWDvH6TJoLo2ngJR0) Trump has taken away health care and benefits for veterans.

disclaimer_text: paid for by cutting your health care, raising your costs, and gutting services
body:
Ben Cline’s budget breaks Virginia families—and hands your tax dollars to billionaires.

| | | | | [|
---](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=0235ca21ea&e=0fced71d8c)

---](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=c9ac49e551&e=0fced71d8c)
| Ken Mitchell didn’t spend 24 years in the military to watch our communities be sold out to billionaires and special interests.He’s running for Congress because he believes rural Virginians and working families deserve better—**not a $7 trillion giveaway to the ultra-rich paid for by cutting your health care, raising your costs, and gutting services.** Here’s what Ben Cline and Trump’s MAGA budget really means for your family and your neighbors:
---
|
---
| 🚨 **$7 trillion in tax breaks** to the wealthiest Americans and big corporations
🚨 **$314,266/year** in tax cuts for the top 0.1%
🚨 **YOU** pay the price—with higher costs, fewer services, and zero accountability
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [➡️ [RUSH A DONATION – ELECT KEN MITCHELL]](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=778487302b&e=0fced71d8c)
---
| **This is what’s at stake in Virginia’s 6th District:** 🔴 **188,992 people** could lose Medicaid coverage—including
🔹 88,441 children
🔹 16,000 seniors🔴 **40,000 ACA recipients** face a 64% hike in premiums
▶️ A 60-year-old couple earning $85K/year would pay **$12,417 more every year** 🔴 **89,000 Virginians** could lose access to food assistance through SNAP🔴 **451,117 kids statewide** could lose free school meals🔴 **13,019 students** could lose their Pell Grants and their shot at a college degree🔴 **10,896 federal workers** in our district face MAGA layoffs that threaten their livelihoods and our local economy
---
|
---
| **Meanwhile, Ben Cline is too busy doing Trump’s bidding:** ✅ Voted to slash health care and union protections
✅ Backed January 6 rioter pardons
✅ Attacked migrants and blocked refugee resettlement
✅ Silent while Trump pushes tariffs that would spike prices on everyday goods
---
|
---
| **Ken Mitchell is everything Ben Cline is not:** ✔️ Delivered real infrastructure projects across Virginia
✔️ Connected rural communities to broadband
✔️ Stands with working families—because he’s one of us
---
|
---
| This race is winnable—but only if we fight like hell and fund this campaign with **real grassroots power.** Every dollar goes directly to talking to voters, countering GOP lies, and fighting for the future of Medicaid, food assistance, Pell Grants, and affordable health care.👉 [**Can you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can today to help Ken flip this seat?**](https://kenmitchellforvirginia.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=435990a56c5fdf5272fa9ea86&id=73a6b2e820&e=0fced71d8c)

Here’s what Ben Cline and Trump’s MAGA budget really means for your family and your neighbors: | | 🚨 $7 trillion in tax breaks to the wealthiest Americans and big corporations 🚨 $314,266/year in tax cuts for the top 0.1% 🚨 YOU pay the price—with higher costs, fewer services, and zero accountability | | | | | | | | | | | [➡️ [RUSH A DONATION – ELECT KEN MITCHELL]]() | This is what’s at stake in Virginia’s 6th District: 🔴 188,992 people could lose Medicaid coverage—including 🔹 88,441 children 🔹 16,000 seniors🔴 40,000 ACA recipients face a 64% hike in premiums ▶️ A 60-year-old couple earning $85K/year would pay $12,417 more every year 🔴 89,000 Virginians could lose access to food assistance through SNAP🔴 451,117 kids statewide could lose free school meals🔴 13,019 students could lose their Pell Grants and their shot at a college degree🔴 10,896 federal workers in our district face MAGA layoffs that threaten their livelihoods and our local economy | | Meanwhile, Ben Cline is too busy doing Trump’s bidding: ✅ Voted to slash health care and union protections ✅ Backed January 6 rioter pardons ✅ Attacked migrants and blocked refugee resettlement ✅ Silent while Trump pushes tariffs that would spike prices on everyday goods | | Ken Mitchell is everything Ben Cline is not: ✔️ Delivered real infrastructure projects across Virginia ✔️ Connected rural communities to broadband ✔️ Stands with working families—because he’s one of us | | This race is winnable—but only if we fight like hell and fund this campaign with real grassroots power. Every dollar goes directly to talking to voters, countering GOP lies, and fighting for the future of Medicaid, food assistance, Pell Grants, and affordable health care.👉 | [➡️ [DONATE NOW – PROTECT OUR FUTURE]]() | The billionaires and Trump have Ben Cline. Ken Mitchell has you. Let’s win this—together. | Join me in defeating Ben Cline and bringing real representation to the sixth congressional district. —Ken Mitchell | | | | | | | | | | Authorized and Paid for by Ken Mitchell for Virginia PO Box 1795 Harrisonburg, VA 22803 | | This email was sent to mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Ken Mitchell for Virginia 850 W Market Street Harrisonburg, VA 22801 * USA

name: LCV Membership Team
subject: Good Climate News — Earth Month 2025
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTI0ODU0ODUS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjIyMDEzMTI2NAS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Hi Peter, During Earth Month in April, activists like you from across the country showed
up to advocate on behalf of our communities and the environment, from local
grassroots to federal efforts. We’re celebrating our planet, and all the people
like you who are fighting to protect it, with an Earth Month roundup of good
climate news. Clean energy continues to grow across the U.S. Even in the face of an unfriendly administration, clean energy continues to make
strides across the country. In March 2025, renewable energy provided more electricity to the U.S. grid than fossil fuels https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-LXrBzKqKLCe/UzZ3ZDAvY0llN3hMdjc2Q2djdUVnUFRsVUl2cVN2REZ6M3p2MUkvWnNzWEkzTkNrUWNnME4yWUFzOXRORjl6eTg0NUxjWk9PWldFK1VGRXByZHBCYzN1K1NoNzhaZElQRjRUL0VpQmxKN1k9S0/ for the first time ever. During that month, clean energy provided 51% of U.S.
electricity, compared to fossil fuels’ 49%. This is a major milestone for clean
energy in the U.S. which continues to prove its strength despite the constant
barrage of attacks from the administration. In fact, a recent analysis https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/x_yzTgY2Y7Sx/UzZ3ZDAvY0llN3hMdjc2Q2djdUVnUFRsVUl2cVN2REZ6M3p2MUkvWnNzWEkzTkNrUWNnME4yWUFzOXRORjl6eTg0NUxjWk9PWldFK1VGRXByZHBCYzN1K1NoNzhaZElQRjRUL0VpQmxKN1k9S0/ from the U.S. Energy Information Administration and BloombergNEF shows that even
if Trump succeeds in implementing his deregulatory agenda, renewable energy
generation in the U.S. will continue to increase. The durability of the clean
energy transition is great news for the future of our planet and the health of
our communities. In another milestone, the city of Sun Prairie, Wisconsin became the first city in the state to run all city operations on 100% renewable energy. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/_4bqME3D3kh2/UzZ3ZDAvY0llN3hMdjc2Q2djdUVnUFRsVUl2cVN2REZ6M3p2MUkvWnNzWEkzTkNrUWNnME4yWUFzOXRORjl6eTg0NUxjWk9PWldFK1VGRXByZHBCYzN1K1NoNzhaZElQRjRUL0VpQmxKN1k9S0/ All of Sun Prairie’s street lights, well pumps, city facilities and more are now
operating on zero-emissions energy, which is lowering energy costs for city
residents and reducing harmful emissions. Judicial victories for environmental programs In a long awaited decision, Judge Tanya Chutkan of the District Court for the District of Columbia ruled EPA illegally froze $20 billion https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/9zEZMdm0mVQ3/UzZ3ZDAvY0llN3hMdjc2Q2djdUVnUFRsVUl2cVN2REZ6M3p2MUkvWnNzWEkzTkNrUWNnME4yWUFzOXRORjl6eTg0NUxjWk9PWldFK1VGRXByZHBCYzN1K1NoNzhaZElQRjRUL0VpQmxKN1k9S0/ in congressionally appropriated climate grants obligated to eight nonprofit
organizations. EPA alleged there was fraud within the program, but could produce
no evidence to support their claim. Due to this lack of evidence, Chutkan
ordered the immediate release of the frozen funds to the organizations. While
EPA has appealed the ruling, it sets an important precedent for holding agencies
accountable for carrying out congressionally mandated duties. Later the same week, Judge Mary McElroy, a Trump appointee, ruled that several agencies, including EPA, the Department of Energy, and the Department of the Interior, must immediately resume disbursing funding https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/yAyZMNqRqptj/UzZ3ZDAvY0llN3hMdjc2Q2djdUVnUFRsVUl2cVN2REZ6M3p2MUkvWnNzWEkzTkNrUWNnME4yWUFzOXRORjl6eTg0NUxjWk9PWldFK1VGRXByZHBCYzN1K1NoNzhaZElQRjRUL0VpQmxKN1k9S0/ from the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) and bipartisan infrastructure law (IIJA).
The funding had been indefinitely and illegally frozen since January. McElroy’s
order will apply to all IRA and IIJA grants, not just the ones involved in the
lawsuit, making this a huge win for climate progress. A federal judge in New York dismissed a lawsuit https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/DzpWMVgGgWfv/UzZ3ZDAvY0llN3hMdjc2Q2djdUVnUFRsVUl2cVN2REZ6M3p2MUkvWnNzWEkzTkNrUWNnME4yWUFzOXRORjl6eTg0NUxjWk9PWldFK1VGRXByZHBCYzN1K1NoNzhaZElQRjRUL0VpQmxKN1k9S0/ that aimed to roll back air emissions rules in New York City. The lawsuit was
brought against a 2021 NYC law that sets strict air emissions limits for new
construction, effectively banning the use of natural gas in new buildings. This
dismissal could inspire other cities to pursue ambitious action on natural gas. Want more good climate news? Follow us on Instagram https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/04wrM8rqr9Ta/UzZ3ZDAvY0llN3hMdjc2Q2djdUVnUFRsVUl2cVN2REZ6M3p2MUkvWnNzWEkzTkNrUWNnME4yWUFzOXRORjl6eTg0NUxjWk9PWldFK1VGRXByZHBCYzN1K1NoNzhaZElQRjRUL0VpQmxKN1k9S0/, BlueSky https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Pwb7C7-p-Eh9/UzZ3ZDAvY0llN3hMdjc2Q2djdUVnUFRsVUl2cVN2REZ6M3p2MUkvWnNzWEkzTkNrUWNnME4yWUFzOXRORjl6eTg0NUxjWk9PWldFK1VGRXByZHBCYzN1K1NoNzhaZElQRjRUL0VpQmxKN1k9S0/, and X (formerly Twitter) https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/4L4XBdYqY4Q3/UzZ3ZDAvY0llN3hMdjc2Q2djdUVnUFRsVUl2cVN2REZ6M3p2MUkvWnNzWEkzTkNrUWNnME4yWUFzOXRORjl6eTg0NUxjWk9PWldFK1VGRXByZHBCYzN1K1NoNzhaZElQRjRUL0VpQmxKN1k9S0/ for weekly Good Climate News updates. To get involved in bringing about even more good climate news, join us at lcv.org/get-involved/ https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/vNR6fELVL~. One more thing, Peter. In this fraught political moment, it is more important than ever to make your voice heard to protect people and
the planet.One of the most effective ways to get involved in making positive change is by
calling your members of Congress. If you’ve never called before, or you just
need a refresher, check out this blog on how to call your members of Congress. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/3Z0ec- Thank you for being with us in this fight. LCV Membership Team
Annie, Shae, Chris, Alex, and Kelly This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12485485&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjIyMDEzMTI2NAS2&spReportId=MjIyMDEzMTI2NAS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12485485&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjIyMDEzMTI2NAS2&spReportId=MjIyMDEzMTI2NAS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.
clean_body: To view this mail in a browser, copy into your browser. Hi Peter, During Earth Month in April, activists like you from across the country showed up to advocate on behalf of our communities and the environment, from local grassroots to federal efforts. We’re celebrating our planet, and all the people like you who are fighting to protect it, with an Earth Month roundup of good climate news. Clean energy continues to grow across the U.S. Even in the face of an unfriendly administration, clean energy continues to make strides across the country. In March 2025, renewable energy provided more electricity to the U.S. grid than fossil fuels for the first time ever. During that month, clean energy provided 51% of U.S. electricity, compared to fossil fuels’ 49%. This is a major milestone for clean energy in the U.S. which continues to prove its strength despite the constant barrage of attacks from the administration. In fact, a recent analysis from the U.S. Energy Information Administration and BloombergNEF shows that even if Trump succeeds in implementing his deregulatory agenda, renewable energy generation in the U.S. will continue to increase. The durability of the clean energy transition is great news for the future of our planet and the health of our communities. In another milestone, the city of Sun Prairie, Wisconsin became the first city in the state to run all city operations on 100% renewable energy. All of Sun Prairie’s street lights, well pumps, city facilities and more are now operating on zero-emissions energy, which is lowering energy costs for city residents and reducing harmful emissions. Judicial victories for environmental programs In a long awaited decision, Judge Tanya Chutkan of the District Court for the District of Columbia ruled EPA illegally froze $20 billion in congressionally appropriated climate grants obligated to eight nonprofit organizations. EPA alleged there was fraud within the program, but could produce no evidence to support their claim. Due to this lack of evidence, Chutkan ordered the immediate release of the frozen funds to the organizations. While EPA has appealed the ruling, it sets an important precedent for holding agencies accountable for carrying out congressionally mandated duties. Later the same week, Judge Mary McElroy, a Trump appointee, ruled that several agencies, including EPA, the Department of Energy, and the Department of the Interior, must immediately resume disbursing funding from the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) and bipartisan infrastructure law (IIJA). The funding had been indefinitely and illegally frozen since January. McElroy’s order will apply to all IRA and IIJA grants, not just the ones involved in the lawsuit, making this a huge win for climate progress. A federal judge in New York dismissed a lawsuit that aimed to roll back air emissions rules in New York City. The lawsuit was brought against a 2021 NYC law that sets strict air emissions limits for new construction, effectively banning the use of natural gas in new buildings. This dismissal could inspire other cities to pursue ambitious action on natural gas. Want more good climate news? Follow us on Instagram , BlueSky , and X (formerly Twitter) for weekly Good Climate News updates. To get involved in bringing about even more good climate news, join us at lcv.org/get-involved/ . One more thing, Peter. In this fraught political moment, it is more important than ever to make your voice heard to protect people and the planet.One of the most effective ways to get involved in making positive change is by calling your members of Congress. If you’ve never called before, or you just need a refresher, check out this blog on how to call your members of Congress. Thank you for being with us in this fight. LCV Membership Team Annie, Shae, Chris, Alex, and Kelly This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information here to unsubscribe from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email!
